title: Full-Time AI Creative Specialist
description:
Full-Time AI Creative Specialist

Base Image Creation | High-Level Creative Team | Growth Opportunity

We are looking for a full-time AI Creative Specialist who can create high-quality base images made specifically for video advertisements.

This is not a video editing role.

Your responsibility is to create the foundation image — the main visual that everything starts from.

These base images will later be used by our animation team for B-roll creation and by our video editing team for final advertisements.

You are the first and most important step in the creative process.

If the base image is weak, unrealistic, or low quality, the final ad will fail.

You will work from storyboard briefs created by our video editors. Based on these briefs, you must create strong, realistic, high-converting visual assets that feel premium, trustworthy, and natural.

The standard is simple:

there should be almost no visible difference between your work and reality.

We are looking for someone with very high standards, strong taste, attention to detail, and someone who understands what makes an ad look expensive, trustworthy, and built to convert.

You will be joining a fast-growing international e-commerce brand with a 15-person marketing team focused heavily on performance marketing and creative testing.

What You Will Do

Create high-quality base images for advertisement use

Turn storyboard briefs into strong visual foundations for video ads

Build animation-ready assets that can later be turned into B-roll

Make sure all visuals are realistic, premium, and conversion-focused

Avoid unnatural visuals, obvious mistakes, and scam-looking creatives

Continuously improve outputs so ads feel real and trustworthy

Stay updated with the newest creative systems and workflows

Work closely with our creative, animation, and video teams

Understand that your work is the starting point of the entire ad production process

What We Need

Full-time availability

Around 50 hours per week

Very high standards for realism and quality

Strong understanding of premium e-commerce creatives

Ability to identify when content looks fake or unnatural

Someone who works fast without sacrificing quality

A-player mindset and strong ownership

Someone who wants to grow with the team long-term

Someone who understands that details d
 performance

Salary

$700 USD per month

Growth Opportunity

This role is for people who want to stay ahead of the market.

You will work inside a high-level marketing team and continuously learn the newest systems, workflows, and ways to create better-performing creatives.

The goal is not just making images.

The goal is becoming someone who understands how winning creatives are built from the very first frame.

If you are serious, hungry, and want to grow inside a real performance-driven team, apply here:

title: Financial & Operations Audit Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to support financial accuracy and operational follow-through across the business.

This role goes beyond completing tasks—you will be responsible for auditing, verifying, and ensuring that financial and operational processes are executed correctly and on time. You will help bring structure, accountability, and precision to a fast-moving environment, ensuring nothing is missed and all data is accurate.

This role operates within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST.

 Compensation is hourly, up to $6/hour, based on active work performed.

Availability during this window is required, with flexibility depending on workload. This is a part-time role starting at up to 5 hours per week, with potential for growth as trust is built. You may work with other clients.



Qualifications



Character – High Trust

 You are reliable and honest. You take ownership of your work and handle financial and business information with care and integrity.



Teachable – Humility

 You are open to feedback, willing to learn, and able to adjust quickly when processes change.



Competence – Experience

 You have experience in bookkeeping, financial tracking, or administrative support and can confidently review and verify data with accuracy. Experience with QuickBooks, CRM tools, and basic accounting principles is required.

This role involves access to sensitive financial data. Accuracy, discretion, and consistency are non-negotiable.



Core Responsibilities

Audit and verify invoices for accuracy, including checking calculations

 Track and review profit and loss for each job

 Ensure invoices are sent within 48 business hours after job completion

 Review bookkeeping entries and flag discrepancies

 Follow up with clients regarding invoices, missing information, or clarifications

 Monitor project issues and send follow-up reminders as needed

 Ensure processes are followed and nothing falls through the cracks

 Maintain accurate records and support overall operational accountability



Communication & Workflow Expectations

Respond to messages within 15 minutes during working hours

 Accurately track hours worked

 Notify the client immediately upon reaching 5 hours in a week

 Once tasks are complete, proactively move on to other client work

 Self-manage workload without requiring constant oversight



Performance & Accountability

Maintain a high level of accuracy and attention to detail at all times

 Be open to a third-party performance audit once per year

 Ensure time spent aligns with expected output and industry standards

 Take ownership of work quality, consistency, and reliability



What Success Looks Like

Invoices and financial records are accurate and verified

 Deadlines are met consistently, especially for invoicing timelines

 Issues and discrepancies are identified early and resolved quickly

 Nothing is missed, delayed, or overlooked

 The business operates with greater financial clarity and accountability



***Application Requirements***

To be considered, please complete all of the following:



1. Loom Video (2–3 minutes)

 Please submit a Loom video introducing yourself. Share your name, age, and a brief overview of your current background or life situation (for example: student, working professional, career transition, etc.).



2. Written Response (3–5 sentences)

 Describe a time when you had to review work for accuracy (your own or someone else’s) and found an error, discrepancy, or missing detail. What did you do to fix it, and how did you make sure it didn’t happen again?



AI Policy: AI tools are encouraged to assist with writing, organization, or research tasks. However, we prefer that it NOT be used for direct communication with tea
mbers. We are committed to genuine human connection, ensuring all interactions feel authentic and organic. We are not looking for PERFECT, we are looking for Human. :)



Why This Role Matters

This role is built on a simple principle: accuracy and accountability create stability in a business. Your role is to help ensure that financial data and operational processes are correct, consistent, and reliable.

By bringing precision and follow-through, you allow the business owner to make better decisions and operate with confidence. When you do this role well, you are not just checking work—you are protecting the integrity of the business.

If you take pride in accuracy, are proactive in catching mistakes, and value being someone others can rely on, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us a message with your Loom link, written response, and your
.

We are seeking a versatile and detail-oriented WordPress Developer and Graphic Design Expert to build and manage a professional Health Industry E-commerce website that focuses on Peptide Science.



The ideal candidate is a hybrid expert: you must be technically proficient in WooCommerce and the Avada Theme, while also possessing the creative talent to design a professional brand identity using Adobe Illustrator. This is a project-based role with a path to a long-term, full-time partnership.



Key Responsibilities

Avada Theme Mastery: Use the Avada Live Builder to create high-converting, custom layouts without relying solely on templates.

Optimization: Ensure the store is high-speed, mobile-responsive, and secure for medical-related transactions.

Custom Graphics: Use Adobe Illustrator to create original vector icons, product diagrams, and branded UI elements.



Web Assets: Design banners, high-quality graphics for blog posts, and e-commerce UI icons.



Required Technical Skills

Avada Theme: Deep experience with the Avada ecosystem, Fusion Builder/Avada Live, and Global Options.



Adobe Illustrator: High proficiency is mandatory for logo and custom vector graphic creation.



Health Industry Knowledge: Ability to present sensitive medical/pricing information clearly and professionally.



Hours: 40 hours per week.



Schedule: [e.g., EST Hours or Flexible].

How to Apply

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (Paid Training + Result Bonuses)
description:
We are hiring hungry, motivated part-time call agents to work outbound calls with business owners as part of our active marketing campaigns. Your job is to engage business owners, qualify them fast, and lock in a Zoo
eting for our sales team.



This is a sales role. You will be picking up the phone, making outbound calls, and fielding inbound calls from business owners. If you are not comfortable owning a conversation, this is not for you.

You will use GoHighLevel (GHL) to schedule appointments and record notes.

Responsibilities



Make outbound calls to business owners

Answer inbound calls from business owners

Follow a proven call flow and script

Ask sharp qualification questions

Schedule Zoom appointments in GoHighLevel (GHL)

Log clean notes in the CRM

Keep a professional, confident, and persuasive tone on every call



Requirements

Clear, professional English

Confident and comfortable owning conversations with business owners

Strong, persuasive phone presence

Reliable internet connection

Quiet, distraction-free workspace

Ability to follow a process and stay consistent

Willing to learn and work inside GoHighLevel (GHL)



Bonuses

$10 per qualified booking

$100 bonus for every contract signed from your booked appointments

Consistent long-term work for agents who deliver

The math is simple. Book more qualified meetings, earn more money.



What Is a Qualified Booking

A qualified booking must meet all of the following:

The business owner agrees to a Zoo
eting

The meeting is scheduled in GoHighLevel

The business owner answers all qualification questions correctly

The appointment actually happens (the business owner attends the Zoo
eting)



How to Apply

Please include the following with your application:

State your favorite food

A 30 second voice recording introducing yourself (applications without this are automatically rejected)

Your experience making outbound or inbound sales calls or booking appointments

Your availability during US business hours

Cold calling or outbound sales

Appointment setting

CRM experience

GoHighLevel experience

title: High Commission B2C Sales & B2B Calling Positions
description:
Job Opportunity: Sales Specialist & Cold Caller

We are seeking a results-driven Sales Specialist & Cold Caller to join our growing team. This role is designed for a high-energy individual who excels at initiating conversations, overcoming objections, and closing deals. You will be the first point of contact for many of our clients, requiring a professional and persuasive communication style. We need someone flexible with a very good accent or tone of voice.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Prospecting: Conduct high-volume cold calls to generate leads and identify potential customers.

Lead Qualification: Evaluate prospect needs and qualify opportunities based on specific criteria.

Sales Execution: Manage the full sales cycle from initial contact to closing the deal.

Pipeline Management: Maintain an organized CRM to track interactions and follow-up schedules.



Candidate Requirements

Communication Style: Must possess a neutral tone of voice or a clear American accent to effectively engage with our primary market.

Persistence: A resilient "hunter" mentality with the ability to handle rejection professionally.

Experience: Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or inside sales.

Equipment: A stable internet connection and a high-quality headset for clear communication.



Compensation & Perks

We offer a competitive structure designed to reward high performers:

Base Rate: $5.00 – $8.00 per hour (commensurate with experience).

Daily Commissions: Earn between $50 and $450 per day based on performance and successful conversions.

Growth: Opportunity to work in a fast-paced environment with a direct impact on company revenue.



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume along with a short voice recording (60 seconds or less) introducing yourself and summarizing your sales experience. Applications without a voice sample will not be considered.

Whatsapp Number:

title: Executive Assistant | With B2B and Ops Management Experience
description:
The Role

We are looking for a high-level Executive Assistant who thrives at the intersection of B2B Sales and Operations Management. This isn't a typical "scheduling and
s" role; you will be the engine behind our business development and the primary liaison for our collision center partnerships.



You will manage the front-end sales pipeline through cold calling and warm handoffs, while simultaneously ensuring our internal operations—from CRM tracking to partner onboarding—run with surgical precision.



Key Responsibilities

B2B Outreach & Sales: Conduct high-volume cold calling to collision centers and body shops. You must be comfortable navigating gatekeepers to reach decision-makers and executing "Warm Handoffs."

Pipeline Management: Own the CRM. You will track every lead from "Entity Designation" through the "Current Lifecycle Stage," ensuring no referral partner or claim falls through the cracks.

Operations Oversight: Manage and optimize the Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for partner acquisitions. This includes coordinating marketing stipends and referral payouts.

Communication Management: Handle "First Outreach" sequences, "No Show" follow-ups, and referral requests using established
 and messaging templates.

Performance Metrics: Meet daily targets for dials, connects, and qualified appointments.



Qualifications & Skills

The Voice: You must have a neutral or American accent with a professional, persuasive tone of voice.

B2B Experience: Proven track record in B2B sales, cold calling, or business development.

Ops Mastery: Experience managing complex workflows or sales operations. If you don't love organization and tracking metrics, this is not the role for you.

Technical Proficiency: Advanced experience with CRM systems and pipeline management.

title: "Jack of All Trades" Web & Social Media Designer – ?40,000/mo
description:
Are you a design generalist who can jump from a Shopify backend to a Figma layout without breaking a sweat?



We are a growing team looking for a well-rounded, "Senior-level" Creative Generalist. We don't just need a "graphic designer"—we need someone who understands how design works across websites, e-commerce stores, and social media feeds. You will be responsible for maintaining our digital presence across multiple brands, ensuring everything looks premium and functions perfectly.



What You’ll Be Doing:



This is a high-variety role. On any given day, you might be:



- Web Maintenance: Updating banners, products, and landing pages on Shopify, WordPress, and any other related platform.

- Social Media Design: Creating high-engagement posts, stories, and carousels for social media accounts.

- UI/UX Tweaks: Using Figma to map out website improvements before implementing them.

- E-commerce Support: Managing the visual side of our Shopify accounts (uploading assets, adjusting themes).

- Content Production: Designing digital newsletters, ads, and various brand assets.

- Ad Hoc Tasks: Various backend or administrative tasks as required by the business.



Technical Requirements (The "Must-Haves"):



To succeed in this role, you must have strong experience in:



- Design Systems: Expert-level Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/Illustrator) and Figma.

- Web Platforms: Deep familiarity with Shopify, WordPress, and any other related platform.

- Social Management: Experience with Meta Business Suite and other scheduling tools.

- UI/UX Principles: You don’t just make things look "pretty"; you make them user-friendly and conversion-optimized.

- Versatility: You can pivot between high-end web design and quick-turnaround social media assets.



Schedule & Compensation:



- Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week).

- Shift: 5:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT). Can be a bit flexible.

- Starting Pay: ?40,000 per month.

- Stability: This is a permanent position with room for growth as we scale our agency.



Why Join Us?



Collaborative Team: You’ll work alongside our Amazon Specialist and Graphic Designer.

Growth Path: We reward loyalty and high-level problem solvers.

Creative Freedom: You’ll have a voice in how our brands are presented to the world.



How to Apply (Read Carefully):



To prove your attention to detail, please follow these instructions:



- Subject Line: "I am your Design Ninja - [Your Name]"

- Include a link to your Portfolio (Be sure it shows a mix of web design and social media work).

- List the top 3 design systems/platforms you are most proficient in.

- Confirm you are comfortable with the 5:00 PM – 1:00 AM PHT shift.



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: AI image Specialist
description:
Full-Time AI Creative Specialist

Base Image Creation | High-Level Creative Team | Growth Opportunity



We are looking for a full-time AI Creative Specialist who can create high-quality base images made specifically for video advertisements.



This is not a video editing role.



Your responsibility is to create the foundation image — the main visual that everything starts from.



These base images will later be used by our animation team for B-roll creation and by our video editing team for final advertisements.



You are the first and most important step in the creative process.



If the base image is weak, unrealistic, or low quality, the final ad will fail.



You will work from storyboard briefs created by our video editors. Based on these briefs, you must create strong, realistic, high-converting visual assets that feel premium, trustworthy, and natural.



The standard is simple:



there should be almost no visible difference between your work and reality.



We are looking for someone with very high standards, strong taste, attention to detail, and someone who understands what makes an ad look expensive, trustworthy, and built to convert.



You will be joining a fast-growing international e-commerce brand with a 15-person marketing team focused heavily on performance marketing and creative testing.



What You Will Do



Create high-quality base images for advertisement use



Turn storyboard briefs into strong visual foundations for video ads



Build animation-ready assets that can later be turned into B-roll



Make sure all visuals are realistic, premium, and conversion-focused



Avoid unnatural visuals, obvious mistakes, and scam-looking creatives



Continuously improve outputs so ads feel real and trustworthy



Stay updated with the newest creative systems and workflows



Work closely with our creative, animation, and video teams



Understand that your work is the starting point of the entire ad production process



What We Need



Full-time availability



Around 50 hours per week



Very high standards for realism and quality



Strong understanding of premium e-commerce creatives



Ability to identify when content looks fake or unnatural



Someone who works fast without sacrificing quality



A-player mindset and strong ownership



Someone who wants to grow with the team long-term



Someone who understands that details d
 performance



Salary



$700 USD per month



Growth Opportunity



This role is for people who want to stay ahead of the market.



You will work inside a high-level marketing team and continuously learn the newest systems, workflows, and ways to create better-performing creatives.



The goal is not just making images.



The goal is becoming someone who understands how winning creatives are built from the very first frame.



If you are serious, hungry, and want to grow inside a real performance-driven team, apply here:

mbers are accountable for fulfilling this.

s, live chat, and text messages

mbers and report to the superiors

s

What we can offer:



- Paid training on all aspects of the role

- Overtime (if approved by the manager) is paid at the same rate as base salary

- 15 paid days off per year (with an option to convert them to cash if not used)

title: PHP 150K-200K+ | Remote High-Performance Closer (US Client)
description:

PMHOA Pro Is Hiring a High-Performance Closer (Full Cycle – Call - Meet - Close)

Remote • Full-Time Contractor • Competitive Compensation + Growth



**APPLY HERE: 
/careers/51



PMHOA Pro is the leading outsourced business development partner helping home service providers (roofers, remediation, HVAC, cleaning, plumbing, landscaping, etc.) win relationships with Property Managers and HOAs across the U.S.



We are expanding our elite sales team and looking for a full-cycle Closer who can call inbound/warm opportunities, meet with them on Zoom, and close deals confidently.



If you thrive in a fast-moving sales environment and have the numbers to back up your performance, we want to talk.





// What You’ll Be Doing



You will own the full sales cycle:

- Calling qualified prospects already in our CRM or sourcing your own leads

- Running booked and self-scheduled meetings via Zoom (as needed)

- Conducting structured discovery conversations

- Presenting services, pricing, and territory options

- Handling objections with confidence

- Negotiating and finalizing agreements

- Handing off closed deals to onboarding and fulfillment



Additional responsibilities include:

- Managing and updating pipeline stages in HubSpot

- Calling unworked and follow-up leads in the queue

- Collaborating with sales team to increase show-up rates

- Reporting weekly numbers and deal progress



// Role Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Proven experience closing warm B2B leads

- Strong phone presence and comfort calling prospects directly

- Excellent discovery skills and active listening

- Ability to control the call without sounding pushy

- Confidence running full discovery ? offer ? objection ? close

- Organized, reliable, and process-driven with strong CRM discipline

- Data-focused mindset (show-up rate, close rate, revenue tracked)

- Ability to commit to consistent weekly availability



[!] This is not cold calling strangers. Every contact is warm, pre-educated, and entered by Setters, Webinars, or our Research team [!]



// Bonus Points (We Can Train These)

- Experience selling to home service companies

- HubSpot or similar CRM familiarity

- Prior remote sales or BDR roles

- Understanding of property management relationships



You don’t need to know our industry — but you must already know how to close.



// Must Submit to Be Considered

- We don’t accept guesses — only performance. Please provide:

- Past 6–12 months closing metrics, including:

--- Show-up rate

--- Close rate

--- Average deal size

--- Total revenue closed

--- Industry sold into

--- 3–5 recorded closing calls (highly preferred)

- Short Loom or video introduction

- Brief outline of your closing method or call flow



// What You Get

- High volume of warm, qualified opportunities

- Proven scripts, call flows, and presentation frameworks

- Continuous training, coaching, and leadership development

- Fast-moving team with significant growth potential

- Flexible remote work with performance-based earnings



// Do Not Apply If You Are

- Trying to “get into closing” without a track record

- Easily discouraged or unwilling to make outbound calls

- Avoidant of CRM usage or data updates

- Dependent on high-pressure sales tactics

- Uncomfortable being measured on performance



// PAY RATE:

- Pay: PHP80K-120K/month DOE + Commission

- Commission: Paid per signed contract [uncapped]

- Earning Potential: High-performers hit PHP200,000+ per month

- Commission is uncapped — show us you can close and you’ll write your own paycheck.



// How to Apply

- Send the following:

- Résumé

- Verified sales statistics

- Loom or video introduction (strongly recommended)

- Call recordings (if available)



**APPLY HERE:

title: Bookkeeper & Logistics Administrator (Business Central Focus)
description:
About GLLS



GLLS is a fast-growing, systems-driven company operating at the intersection of sales, distribution, and logistics. We specialize in delivering lighting and project-based solutions with precision, speed, and accountability. Our operations rely heavily on structured systems — especially Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central — to keep finance and logistics tightly aligned.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Bookkeeper & Logistics Administrator with strong experience in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central to replace a key tea
mber.



This role sits at the core of our operations — ensuring:

- Financial records are accurate and up to date

- Orders are properly tracked from purchase to delivery

- Data flows cleanly between sales, purchasing, and accounting



You will spend most of your time inside Business Central managing both financial entries and order logistics workflows.



Key Responsibilities:

- Bookkeeping (Primary System: Business Central)

- Maintain accurate financial records within Business Central

- Manage Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR)

- Post purchase invoices, sales invoices, and journal entries

- Assist with month-end close and reporting

- Identify and resolve discrepancies quickly



Logistics & Order Management (Inside Business Central)

- Create and manage purchase orders and sales orders

- Track shipments, deliveries, and order status

- Coordinate with suppliers and freight providers

- Ensure all order documentation is complete and accurate

- Monitor timelines and proactively flag delays or issues

- Support drop shipments and warehouse coordination



Process Discipline:

- Follow structured workflows and SOPs

- Ensure data is entered correctly the first time (reduce rework)

- Maintain clean, organized records across all transactions

- Suggest improvements to workflows and system usage



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience using Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (required)

- Strong understanding of bookkeeping principles (AP, AR, reconciliations)

- Experience managing orders, purchasing, or logistics workflows

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong organizational and time management skills

- Ability to work independently and follow structured systems



Nice to Have:

- Experience in distribution, construction, or project-based businesses

- Familiarity with freight/logistics coordination (DHL, FedEx, UPS)

- Exposure to Dynamics 365 Sales (CRM) integrations

- Experience supporting North American companies



What Success Looks Like:

- Business Central data is clean, accurate, and reliable

- Financials require minimal corrections or rework

- Orders are easy to track with no missing information

- Issues are caught early before impacting customers

- Reduced back-and-forth between sales, ops, and accounting



Compensation:

- Competitive salary based on experience:

- Long-term, stable role

- Opportunity to grow within a structured, systems-driven company



How to Apply



Please submit:

- Your resume

- A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself

A brief explanation of:

- Your Business Central experience (what modules you’ve used)

- Your bookkeeping responsibilities

- Your experience managing orders or logistics

- An example of catching an error or improving a process

title: Fast Placement! VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: AI Analyst (Finance & Systems)
description:
AI Analyst (Finance & Systems)

Position Overview

The AI Analyst will support the Finance organization in advancing data integration, reporting

automation, and AI-driven insights across the company’s core systems. This role is responsible

for bridging financial operations with data infrastructure to enable real-time visibility into

performance and support forward-looking decision-making.

The position will work cross-functionally with Finance, Operations, and Technology teams to

consolidate data sources, standardize reporting, and implement scalable analytics solutions in a

high-growth, multi-entity environment.

Key Responsibilities

? Develop and maintain financial and operational dashboards, including revenue, margin,

and performance metrics

? Integrate and consolidate data across systems such as QuickBooks, Stripe, HubSpot,

Hubstaff, and internal platforms

? Design and implement automated reporting processes to reduce manual workflows

? Support financial forecasting and scenario modeling (e.g., revenue growth, hiring, and

cost projections)

? Leverage AI-enabled tools to generate insights and enhance reporting accuracy and

efficiency

? Partner with Finance leadership to define, track, and improve key performance indicators

? Identify data inconsistencies and implement solutions to improve data integrity and

reliability

Required Qualifications

? 2–5+ years of experience in data analytics, finance analytics, or a related field

? Strong understanding of financial reporting, including P&L, revenue drivers, and cost

structures

? Experience with data querying (SQL or equivalent)

? Experience with business intelligence tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

? Ability to work with and synthesize data from multiple systems and sources

? Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills

title: Performance Creative Strategist
description:
About the Role





We run a Shopify e-commerce store selling specialized women's intimate apparel — specifically designed for women between 40 and 70. Our audience is real, our product solves a real problem, and our ads need to reflect that with empathy, intelligence, and high-converting creative.

This is not a "execute the brief and clock out" role. We're looking for someone who thinks like an owner — someone who spots opportunities, brings bold ideas to the table, and has the skills to execute them end-to-end. If you get genuinely excited about great copy, scroll-stopping hooks, and creative that actually converts, keep reading.

What You'll Own





End-to-end Meta Ads creative production — from concept and script to final video edit, launch-ready.

High-conversion storytelling ad copy — You write
 ad copy that reads like a story and sells like a machine. VSLs, UGC-style scripts, hooks, narrative frameworks — you've done it all and have results to show for it.

Professional-level copywriting — You understand direct response principles, emotional triggers, and how to write for a specific avatar. You don't write filler. Every word earns its place.

 Ads Library research — You proactively dig into competitors, spot winning angles, deconstruct what's working at scale, and translate those insights into new creative briefs and tests.

Short-form video & VSL editing — You produce compelling short-form videos and VSLs optimized for Meta placements — hook-first, fast-paced, built to hold attention and drive action.

AI tools mastery — You're fluent with Claude, Higgsfield AI, and other AI tools for image, video, and copy generation. You don't just use them — you prompt them with surgical precision to produce content that feels genuinely human.

Listicle & advertorial landing pages on GemPages (Shopify) — You can write and build advertorial-style and listicle landing pages directly in GemPages. You understand conversion architecture, not just aesthetics.

Innovation & strategic input — You bring ideas we haven't thought of. New angles, emerging formats, tools, trends. You contribute to the direction of the brand's growth — not just the execution of tasks.

Who You Are





Proven e-commerce track record — You've created paid ads for Shopify brands and you understand what it takes to actually sell products online, not just generate traffic.

Empathy for a specific, real audience — Our customer is a woman between 40 and 70 navigating intimate, personal challenges. You can write for her with warmth, honesty, and zero condescension.

Systems thinker — You understand the full funnel: hook ? copy ? landing page ? offer ? retention. Every piece of content you produce fits a bigger picture.

Long-term, growth-oriented mindset — We're building something serious and we want someone who wants to build it with us — not someone who disappears in three months. We reward loyalty, initiative, and results.

Self-starter — You see a gap, you flag it. You spot a test worth running, you pitch it. You don't wait to be told what to do.

Future strategic potential — Down the road, this role has room to evolve into a creative director or head of growth position. If that excites you, we want to hear from you.



We're not looking for someone to follow orders — we're looking for a creative partner who will challenge us, push the work further, and genuinely care about results. Attitude and initiative matter as much as skill here.

How We Work Together





We'll start with a part-time trial phase — roughly half a day per day. This is our way of getting to know each other, building trust, and making sure the work quality is where it needs to be before we go all in.

If the quality is there, we move to full-time — because our goal is to produce the highest possible volume of creatives at scale. But volume without quality is noise. We'd always rather have someone who takes a little longer and delivers work that genuinely moves the needle than someone who ships 10 mediocre creatives a day.

Every ad we run is a direct reflection of the business. A great creative can 3x our return. A lazy one wastes budget and trust. We value craft, and we pay close attention to it.

If you're someone who takes pride in your work and holds yourself to a high standard even when nobody's watching — you'll fit right in here.

Compensation





Base rate — $4/hr — paid reliably. Every hour tracked and compensated.

Monthly performance bonus — Discussed and agreed based on ad results. The better the ads perform, the better the bonus.

Long-term growth path — Real responsibility and an upward trajectory for the right person. We promote from within.

How to Apply





Send us a short application with the following:

Your e-commerce creative experience — brands, ad campaigns, results if possible.

Work samples — ad copy, videos, advertorials, landing pages — real results are a big plus.

AI tools you use daily — which ones you're best at prompting and how you use them in your workflow.

One ad angle idea — that you'd test for a women's intimate apparel brand targeting women between 40 and 70.



?

??  One last thing.



We receive a lot of applications — many of them copy-paste. To confirm you've read this post in full and you're genuinely interested, start your application with the word "GEMPAGES". It's our signal that you're the real deal. Applications that don't include it will not be considered.

title: Evidence Analyst
description:
Rocket Benefits is dedicated to assisting U.S. military veterans in appealing disability claim decisions made by the United States Veterans Administration. As a rapidly growing, fully funded company, we are committed to delivering exceptional service to our clients.

We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive individuals to join our team. This role is essential in ensuring all client evidence is reviewed, organized, and processed efficiently.





What You’ll Do:

- Organize Client Evidence: Review incoming
s, extract relevant documents or information, and neatly organize them for client review and signature.

- Support Case Preparation: Draft and format evidence forms, cross-check details in our CRM (Lawmatics), and make sure everything is complete and accurate.

- Communicate with Clients: Respond to client
s, texts, and chats with empathy and professionalism. Follow up on missing details or additional evidence when needed.

- Coordinate Across Tools: Use Lawmatics, Google Drive, and Dialpad to track progress, send documents, and ensure smooth communication throughout each case.

- Assist the Team: Partner with Evidence Coordinators to make sure high-priority items are handled on time and to standard.

- Contribute to Improvement: Help maintain organized records, support evolving procedures, and create supporting research documents for client claims.





What We’re Looking For:

- A keen eye for detail — you notice inconsistencies others might miss.

- A strong communicator who can write clearly and professionally.

- Someone who’s organized and adaptable, comfortable handling several cases at once.

- Tech-savvy and confident using tools like Google Drive, Lawmatics, and Dialpad.

- Able to work independently and proactively, taking initiative to keep things moving.

- Comfortable using AI tools (like ChatGPT) to summarize discussions or assist in document drafting.



Work Schedule

11 AM - 7 PM EST or 10 AM - 6 PM EST (or a similar shift).

- Fully remote work with a flexible and supportive environment.

- Opportunity for career growth into a leadership role as the team expands.

Assessment Round: Qualified candidates will receive an assessment task.

Final Interview: Selected candidates will be invited for an interview.

title: Transaction Coordinator - Real Estate - Texas, USA
description:
Transaction Coordinator — Residential Real Estate Team

Subject Line to Use When Applying: "I Am Your TC"

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



Read This Before You Apply

This is not a generic admin job. This is not a "I'll learn as I go" job. This is not a job where you can hide behind a checklist and clock out at exactly 5:00.

We are a residential real estate team in Texas. Our Transaction Coordinator is the spine of our business. When you do your job well, deals close on time, agents look like rockstars, and clients feel taken care of from contract to close. When you do your job poorly, deals fall apart, agents lose commissions, and clients lose their dream home. There is no middle ground.

If that sentence made your stomach turn, close this tab. If it made you sit up straighter, keep reading.



Who This Job Is For



You have real, hands-on transaction coordination experience in U.S. residential real estate. You know what an executed contract looks like, what an option period is, and what happens if an addendum isn't signed before the deadline.

You are obsessive about details. You re-read your own
s before sending them. You catch the typo. You notice the missing initial on page 14.

You chase deadlines like your paycheck depends on it because in this industry, it does.

You communicate proactively. You'd rather over-update than leave anyone wondering.

You are calm under pressure. When a lender goes silent 48 hours before closing, you don't panic, you start solving.

You own your mistakes. When something slips, you say so, fix it, and make sure it never happens again.

You can hold U.S. Central Time business hours without complaint. This is non-negotiable.





Who This Job Is NOT For



People who need to be told what to do every day.

People who confuse "busy" with "productive."

People who go quiet when things get hard.

People who get defensive when given direct feedback.

People who think "I'll figure it out later" is a real plan.

People who treat real estate transactions like data entry.

People who want a casual, low-stakes role where nobody notices if a deadline slips.



If any of the above describes you, even a little, please don't apply. You will not be happy here, and that matters to us.



The Role

You will be the Transaction Coordinator for a residential real estate team operating in the United States. You own every file from executed contract to funded close. You make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



Responsibilities

Open new files immediately upon executed contract and set up the full transaction in our systems.

Track every deadline: option period, financing, appraisal, title, HOA, survey, closing.

Coordinate communication between agents, lenders, title companies, inspectors, co-op agents, and clients.

Keep our CRM and transaction management software clean, accurate, and up to date — daily.

Send timely status updates to agents and clients without being asked.

Review contracts and addenda for missing signatures, dates, initials, and required disclosures.

Schedule inspections, appraisals, and final walkthroughs.

Prepare and send all required broker compliance documents.

Anticipate problems before they happen and flag them early.

Run a clean closing — clear-to-close confirmed, funding confirmed, files compliant.



Results (What Success Looks Like)



100% of files compliant with broker requirements before closing.

Zero missed contractual deadlines.

Agents on the team free to sell, not chase paperwork.

Clients consistently say some version of: "I have never felt more taken care of in a real estate transaction."



Requirements



Minimum 2 years of U.S. residential real estate transaction coordination experience. Not VA experience. Not general admin. TC experience. (Texas market experience is a major plus and will move your application to the top of the stack.)

Working knowledge of U.S. residential contracts, option periods, financing contingencies, title, and closing processes.

Comfort with CRMs and transaction management platforms (Follow Up Boss, Dotloop, SkySlope, Sisu, or similar).

Excellent written English. You will be writing directly to U.S. agents, clients, lenders, and title companies.

Reliable equipment: quality computer, high-speed internet, webcam, and headset.

Quiet, professional work environment.

Ability to consistently work U.S. Central Time business hours.





How to Apply



Subject line: "I Am Your TC" (exact wording).

In the body of your message: tell us, in your own words, about the hardest transaction you've ever coordinated and how you got it to close.

Attach your resume.



We read every application that follows the instructions. We do not read the ones that don't.

title: Senior Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
Job Overview

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a high-level Senior Business Systems Specialist to help us build, lead, and scale our Software Solutions department. This is a unique, multi-disciplinary role designed for a strategic thinker who sits at the intersection of Finance, Business Operations, and Technology.

 

We aren't just looking for an implementer; we are looking for a partner in growth. You will work directly with leadership to build out our service offerings, meet with potential clients to architect solutions, and eventually help us recruit and mentor the team that will execute your vision. If you have a deep understanding of Dynamics 365, a passion for Power BI analytics, and the business acumen to solve complex operational problems, we want to hear from you.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Practice Development & Strategy

  - Partner with leadership to define and build out our Software Solutions Department services and "go-to-market" strategy.

  - Develop standardized implementation methodologies, project templates, and best practices for the team.

  - Identify and vet new tools and integration patterns that can be productized for our client base.



*Presales & Solution Architecture

  - Join leadership in high-level discovery meetings with potential clients to identify pain points and opportunities.

  - Translate business requirements into technical "Proof of Concepts" and high-level solution designs.

  - Lead the technical scoping and pricing of projects, ensuring Scopes of Work (SOWs) are accurate, profitable, and achievable.



*Senior Implementation & Delivery

  - Act as the lead consultant for high-value Dynamics 365 and Power Platform implementations.

  - Architect advanced Power BI reporting suites that provide clients with real-time visibility into their financial and operational health.

  - Oversee complex data migrations and system integrations, ensuring data integrity across the client's tech stack.



*Team Building & Mentorship

  - Help define the roles and skills needed as we scale the Software Solutions department.

  - Assist in the interviewing, hiring, and onboarding of junior specialists and engineers.

  - Provide technical mentorship and "over-the-shoulder" guidance to ensure high-quality delivery across all projects.



*Operational & Financial Consulting

  - Use your understanding of business operations and finance to advise clients on process improvements (e.g., automated billing, inventory management, financial consolidation).

  - Ensure system configurations align with GAAP/audit requirements and support the client's long-term scalability.

 

Required Qualifications

* Experience: 7–10+ years in business systems consulting, solution architecture, or IT leadership (MSP or Professional Services experience is a major plus).

* Business & Finance Acumen: A strong understanding of core business operations and accounting principles (P&L, Cash Flow, AP/AR, and operational workflows).

* Dynamics 365 Mastery: Proven track record of architecting and implementing Dynamics 365 environments.

* Power BI Expertise: Advanced skills in data modeling and creating executive-level dashboards.

* Presales & Scoping: Experience meeting with clients, identifying needs, and building out detailed project scopes and pricing models.

* Leadership Mindset: A desire to move beyond "doing the work" into building a practice and leading a team.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

* Professional accounting background or deep experience with ERP financial modules.

* Experience with the broader Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate).

* Previous experience in a "Founding" or "Lead" role within a growing technical practice.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

* Phase 1: You are successfully co-leading sales meetings, closing new projects, and delivering high-value implementations.

* Phase 2: You have established a repeatable "playbook" for our business systems offerings and project delivery.

* Phase 3: You are leading a small, high-performing team of specialists, allowing you to focus more on strategy, high-level architecture, and practice growth.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

* Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

* Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

* Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

* Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

* Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

* Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

* Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

* Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Senior Business Systems Specialist, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2027) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Junior IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a Junior IT Engineer to join our growing remote team. This role is ideal for candidates with 0–3 years of experience who are passionate about technology and eager to grow in a supportive environment.



You’ll start by focusing on day-to-day technical support and gradually take on more project-related tasks as your skills develop. You’ll work closely with senior engineers, receive structured onboarding, and get real-world exposure to modern IT environments, tools, and best practices.



If you enjoy troubleshooting, learning new technologies, and providing great service to users, we’d love to hear from you.

- Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, laptops, printers, and peripherals.

- Escalate more complex problems to senior engineers when needed, while staying involved to learn from the resolution.

- Guide end users through basic troubleshooting steps in a clear and professional manner.

- Keep tickets updated with progress notes and resolutions to ensure transparency and team collaboration.

*Cloud Platforms

- Microsoft 365 (user management,
, basic administration)

What We’re Looking For:

- 0–3 years of experience in an IT Support, Helpdesk, or related technical role.

- Recent graduates or career shifters with strong foundational knowledge are welcome to apply.

*Skills & Mindset

- Strong basic troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and simple network issues.

- Familiarity with Microsoft 365 and Windows environments.

- Good English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent customer service mindset – patient, professional, and user-focused.

- A proactive, problem-solving approach with a strong desire to learn and grow.

- Ability to work independently while being an active part of a remote team.



Preferred but Not Required:

These are nice-to-haves, not must-haves. We’re happy to help you grow into them:



* IT certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft Fundamentals, or similar.

* Exposure to firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments (Hyper-V, VMware, etc.).

* Experience with RMM and ticketing tools used in MSPs.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.

title: Go-High-Level Consultant
description:
**Title:**

GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert Needed – 1-on-1 Coaching (Missed Call ? Booked Job System)



---



**Job Overview:**



I am building a simple automation system using GoHighLevel (GHL) for HVAC businesses.



My goal is to help them:



* Capture missed calls

* Respond instantly via SMS

* Book more jobs automatically



Before I start selling this service, I want to **learn how to build and implement this system myself**.



I am looking for a **GoHighLevel expert who can coach me 1-on-1 over Zoom** and teach me step-by-step.



---



**Important: Please Read Carefully**



This is NOT a “do it for me” job.



I am specifically looking for someone who can:



* Teach clearly

* Explain step-by-step

* Help me understand how to build the system myself



If you prefer doing the work instead of teaching, this is not the right fit.



---



**What I Need Help With (Core Focus Only):**



I am NOT trying to learn everything in GoHighLevel.



I only want to master a simple system that includes:



1. **Missed Call Text-Back**



   * Automatically text leads when a call is missed



2. **Speed-to-Lead Automation**



   * Instant SMS response after form submissions



3. **Basic Booking System**



   * Calendar setup + booking links

   * Confirmation and reminder messages



4. **Simple Follow-Up**



   * SMS follow-ups if leads don’t book



5. **Basic CRM Setup**



   * Pipelines and lead tracking



---



**How I Want to Learn:**



* 1-on-1 Zoom sessions (screen share required)

* Step-by-step walkthroughs

* Hands-on implementation (not theory)

* Clear explanations in English



---



**Requirements:**



* Strong experience with GoHighLevel

* Fluent and clear English communication

* Ability to teach simply and effectively

* Experience building systems for service businesses (preferred)

* Reliable internet and working camera/microphone



---



**Application Instructions:**



Before we schedule a Zoom call, please send a **short Loom video (3–5 minutes)** covering:



1. A quick introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with GoHighLevel

3. A simple explanation of how you would set up a **missed call text-back + booking system** for an HVAC business



This will help me understand your communication and teaching style.



---



**Opportunity:**



If we work well together, there is potential for **long-term work**, including helping me build systems for future clients as I grow.



---



**Goal:**



By the end of this, I want to:



* Confidently build this system myself

* Deliver it to HVAC businesses

* Turn it into a recurring service



---



Looking forward to your application.

title: Business Sales Cold Caller
description:
Join our expanding team! We're looking for driven and confident individuals with outbound sales experience to connect with potential B2B clients.

Proven experience managing inventory flow, stock levels, and fulfillment operations

Experience communicating and collaborating with Chinese warehouses or suppliers

Strong background in inventory forecasting, demand planning, and stock management

Excellent communication skills with the ability to be clear, firm, and authoritative

Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills

Fast thinker who can act under pressure

Mandarin speaking is a strong BONUS



-Responsibilities-

Forecast demand and prevent stock shortages before they happen

Coordinate with warehouses, suppliers, and logistics partners

Handle procurement and replenishment decisions

Track shipments and proactively resolve delays or risks

Oversee order scrubbing and fulfillment coordination

Maintain strong control over inventory performance and execution



-Weekly Output Expectations-

Identify delayed or at-risk shipments

Provide actions taken to resolve issues

Present a clear execution plan for the following week

title: Medical Administrative Support Specialist
description:
Job description: We are a Disability and Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing workplace!



The Company: We are a Disability Tax Credit / Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC, Canada. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing work environment! Swift Disability Services assists Canadians in applying for and obtaining approval of the Disability Tax Credit. We work closely with Canadians and their medical professionals to ensure the highest chances of success in what could result in over $45,000 in payments from the CRA to deserving Canadians. We have helped Canadians collect more than $35,000,000 in tax refunds within the last 3 years!



Our mission is to make a meaningful impact on the lives of as many Canadians as possible. We have a built a reputation of unparalleled customer service, leveraging technology and automation to create a more enjoyable experience for our customers and make lives easier for our staff. At Swift, we understand that our people are our most important asset!



The Position:

We are dedicated to building a team of high-performing individuals. We are looking for individuals who will excel in an medical and health focused administrative role. We have lofty goals as a Company, and we are looking for tea
mbers to help us reach them!



We’re looking to add 1-2 Administrative tea
mber at this time.



The position will include:

• $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience), paid bi-weekly via Paypal

• Performance based bonus incentives

• Extensive Training and Support

• 40 hours/week required (Mon – Fri, 8AM – 4:30PM, PST)

• Business casual dress code



Position Requirements:

• Clear and Effective Communication: Exceptionally proficient in both written and verbal English communication to convey information clearly and effectively.

• Versatility and Proactive Mindset: Eagerness to tackle diverse tasks with a can-do attitude and a willingness to assist wherever needed.

• Compassionate Orientation: Passion for supporting individuals in need and contributing to meaningful change in their lives.

• Self-Initiated Learning: Demonstrated ability to swiftly grasp new concepts in a multi-faceted role and self-motivate for continuous learning.

• Masterful Organization: Strong organizational skills to efficiently manage multiple tasks and responsibilities simultaneously.

• Proficiency in Administrative Tasks: Aptitude in data entry, filing, and performing tasks with a high level of accuracy.

• Meticulous Attention to Detail: Exceptional ability to maintain accuracy and precision in all tasks. In your application, please let us know your favourite summer activity – aside from getting to know you better, this will tell us if you have read the ad carefully!

• Document Proofreading and Editing: Ability to review and edit documentation with meticulous attention to detail.

• Process Improvement Focus: Enthusiasm for streamlining and enhancing the efficiency of existing processes.

• Proficiency in Office 365 Suite: Advanced understanding and utilization of Office 365 applications including Word, Excel (advanced skills), Outlook, and Sharepoint.

• Administrative Experience: Prior experience in an office administrative role is required. Prior experience in the medical field is preferred.

• Accounting Exposure: Experience in an accounting-related role involving invoicing, Quickbooks, Accounts Receivable, etc., is an asset.

• Familiarity with CRM and Excel: Experience with Salesforce CRM, or comparable platforms.



Basic Technical Requirements:

• Effective Work Environment: Ensure a dedicated, organized, and ergonomically suitable workstation conducive to productivity and free of distractions. This includes having your own reliable laptop/desktop computer with 8GB RAM and Chrome installed.

• Hardware Capacity: Adequate space on your laptop/desktop computer to efficiently download and run various software required for the job.

• Internet Connection: Maintain a consistent and stable internet connection of at least 10MBPS, along with a backup internet option.

• Equipment: An ideal setup includes the availability of a dual monitor configuration and noise-canceling headset/headphones for an optimal working experience.



Main Responsibilities:

title: Customer Service Representative / Client Relationship Manager
description:
Job description: We are a Disability and Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing workplace!



The Company: We are a Disability Tax Credit / Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC, Canada. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing work environment! Swift Disability Services assists Canadians in applying for and obtaining approval of the Disability Tax Credit. We work closely with Canadians and their medical professionals to ensure the highest chances of success in what could result in over $45,000 in payments from the CRA to deserving Canadians. We have helped Canadians collect more than $35,000,000 in tax refunds within the last 3 years!



Our mission is to make a meaningful impact on the lives of as many Canadians as possible. We have a built a reputation of unparalleled customer service, leveraging technology and automation to create a more enjoyable experience for our customers and make lives easier for our staff. At Swift, we understand that our people are our most important asset!





The Position:

We are dedicated to building a team of high-performing individuals. We are looking for individuals to join our team in the role of Client Relationship Manager. This position is similar to that of a call-center agent. We are looking for individuals who have a proven ability to go above and beyond in order to excel in their position and drive value for a business. We are looking for individuals who are reliable, can handle 100+ calls per day, and can provide exceptional customer service to our clients.



We’re looking to add multiple Client Relationship Managers (sales staff) to our team.



The position will include:

• $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience), paid bi-weekly via Paypal

• Target Based Commission / Additional Incentives

• Extensive Training and Support

• 40 hours/week required (Mon – Fri, 8AM – 4:30PM, PST)

• Business casual dress code





Position Requirements:

• Clear and Effective Communication: Exceptionally proficient in both written and verbal English communication to convey information clearly and effectively.

• Versatility and Proactive Mindset: Eagerness to tackle diverse tasks with a can-do attitude and a willingness to assist wherever needed. Is okay with "repetitive" work.

• Compassionate Client Support: Passion for supporting individuals in need and contributing to meaningful change in their lives.
