title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns

• Willing to train juniors who will be part of the team in the future



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: AI Video Creator | IMMEDIATE HIRE
description:
IF INTERESTED YOU MUST APPLY HERE TO BE CONSIDERED: 



Job Description:

As an AI Video Creator, you will be at the forefront of integrating artificial intelligence in digital marketing. Your primary role will be to utilize various AI tools to generate and produce visual elements for marketing videos. These videos will play a crucial role in enhancing the visual appeal and effectiveness of our social media ad campaigns.



Key Responsibilities:



-Collaborate with Marketing and Video Teams: Work closely with marketing strategists and video editors to understand the specific visual requirements of each campaign. Participate in brainstorming sessions to conceptualize the visual style and imagery needs.

-Create AI-Generated Imagery: Utilize advanced AI image/video generation tools to produce high-quality, creative images/videos and graphics for use in marketing videos and advertisements. Ensure these assets are not only visually appealing but also align with the campaign's message and tone.

-Experiment and Innovate: Continuously experiment with different AI image/video generation techniques and tools to create unique and impactful visuals. Stay updated with the latest AI technology advancements to keep our visuals fresh and innovative.

-Brand Consistency: Ensure all AI-generated imagery adhere to client brand guidelines and maintain a consistent style across various campaigns. Adjust and modify images as needed to fit the brand's visual identity.

-Image Library Management: Develop and maintain an organized library of AI-generated images and videos. Tag and categorize images for easy retrieval and future reference, ensuring efficient workflow and resource utilization.

-Feedback Integration: Incorporate feedback from marketing teams, clients, and focus groups to refine and improve image quality and relevance. Be open to constructive criticism and use it to enhance future designs.

-Trend Analysis and Reporting: Keep track of emerging trends in AI image/video generation and digital marketing. Regularly report on the performance and impact of AI-generated visuals in campaigns, using data to guide future image creation.

-Cross-Functional Collaboration: Engage with other departments like content creation, video production, and digital analytics to ensure a cohesive and integrated approach to campaign development.

-Quality Assurance: Rigorously check and ensure the quality of images, including resolution, color accuracy, and relevance. Address any technical or aesthetic issues promptly.

-Education and Training: Stay educated on best practices in AI and digital imaging. Attend workshops, webinars, and training sessions to enhance skills. Share knowledge and insights with tea
mbers to foster a culture of continuous learning and innovation.

-Project Management: Manage timelines and deliverables for image creation, ensuring all milestones are met within the set deadlines. Coordinate with various teams to align the visual content production with the overall campaign schedule.







Qualifications:



-Proven experience in working with AI image/video generation tools.

-Strong portfolio showcasing expertise in digital imagery and design.

-Ability to translate marketing ideas into visually compelling imagery.

-Proficiency in digital design/editing software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite).

-Excellent collaboration and communication skills.

-Creativity and a keen eye for aesthetics and detail.

-Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously.



IF INTERESTED YOU MUST APPLY HERE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/2475d4d7-7ed7-449e-a350-75eb5484b5db





What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We are looking for a top-tier Patient Care Coordinator to become an integral part of our expanding team. This role is vital in delivering the best care possible to our patients, handling patient communications, and providing essential support to our clinical staff in their mission to offer exceptional care. The ideal candidate will demonstrate exemplary professionalism, excellent English language communication skills, and outstanding organizational abilities with meticulous attention to detail. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute significantly to our patient-centric approach in healthcare delivery.



Responsibilities

• Customize initial discussions based on patient needs, ensuring they understand how the program can address their specific health conditions, providing personalized benefits rather than general services.

• Manage inquiries through multiple communication channels (phone,
, etc.), including voi
 inbox management and message routing, providing prompt and accurate responses.

• Process and manage referrals, working towards efficient conversion within a 7-10 day timeframe while managing multiple referral loop processes for a large patient panel.

• Perform comprehensive data entry including clinical survey scores/results, diagnostic tests, remote physiologic monitoring (RPM), and remote therapeutic monitoring (RTM) data streams.

• Schedule and coordinate patient appointments while maintaining communication with patients regarding their care schedule.

• Manage and process inbound and outbound medical records, ensuring proper documentation and organization.

• Maintain accurate EMR records by updating care notes, face sheets, and ensuring the integrity of patient information.

• Attend clinical meetings, take detailed notes, and follow up on action items and project timelines.

• Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of physicians, engineers, designers, and care tea
mbers to continuously improve patient care delivery.

• Resolve patient issues and complaints, identifying problems and finding appropriate solutions to ensure patient satisfaction while maintaining professional communication throughout the process.



The ideal candidate for this role at Ansible Health is a dynamic professional who thrives in a fast-paced, ever-changing startup environment. They should also possess exceptional English communication skills, both written and verbal, coupled with meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational abilities. They should be adept at managing multiple priorities, from patient onboarding to referral management.



Required Qualifications and Competencies

• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as Nursing, Physical Therapy, or other healthcare-related fields.

• 2+ years of professional experience in a customer service or healthcare setting, demonstrating a deep understanding of patient care and care coordination.

• Solid grasp of the US healthcare system and its intricacies.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

• Proficiency with CRM systems, EMR software, and standard office applications (e.g., Google Suite)

• Training or experience in clinical medicine, such as a nursing degree, nursing assistant, or clinical scribe.

• Typing speed of at least 60 words per minute.

• Reliable internet connection (at least 30 Mbps) and a quiet home environment for work

• Ability to work in US time zones (EST)

• Achieve daily call quotas of 75-100 interactions.

• Adhere to established performance metrics to qualify for incentive plans tied to performance.



Nice to have

• Experience in the healthcare industry or with medical terminology.

• Proven track record in sales.

• Familiarity with remote patient monitoring systems.

• Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and healthcare privacy practices.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: LORA / AI Image Generator
description:
Roles Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled AI Image Creator & LoRA Specialist to spearhead our visual identity on TikTok. The primary focus of this role is to develop and maintain consistent character faces across diverse environments, outfits, and poses.



You will be the architect of our digital "brand ambassadors," ensuring that our AI-generated influencers look identical in every frame, which is critical for building trust and recognition in short-form video promotions.



Key Responsibilities

LoRA Training: Develop, test, and refine high-quality LoRAs (Low-Rank Adaptations) specifically for facial consistency.



Workflow Integration: Utilize the Nano Banana ecosystem to generate high-fidelity assets optimized for social media engagement.



Character Continuity: Ensure the "virtual human" maintains anatomical and facial integrity across different seeds, lighting conditions, and camera angles.



Content Production: Generate a high volume of images for TikTok slideshows, video overlays, and promotional marketing materials.



Prompt Engineering: Master complex prompting to place our consistent characters in trending TikTok scenarios without losing their identity.



Post-Processing: Use Inpainting, ControlNet, and Upscaling techniques to Polish images for high-definition mobile viewing.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Deep Technical Knowledge: Proven experience training LoRAs (via Kohya_ss, OneTrainer, or similar) specifically for faces/people.



Nano Banana Proficiency: Demonstrated ability to navigate the Nano Banana platform/tools to achieve specific artistic outputs.



Stable Diffusion Mastery: Expert-level understanding of Checkpoints, VAEs, and the various Sampling methods.



Facial Restoration Expertise: Skilled in using tools like Adtailer or Reactor to maintain facial features at different scales.



Eye for Viral Aesthetics: A strong understanding of TikTok trends, lighting, and "scroll-stopping" visual styles.



Preferred Tools

AI Stack: Stable Diffusion (A1111, Forge, or ComfyUI), Nano Banana, Flux.1 (if applicable).



Editing: Adobe Photoshop or Canva (for asset cleanup).



Video: CapCut or Premiere Pro (knowledge of how to transition AI images into video is a huge plus).

title: Executive Virtual Assistant & Content Support for a Mindfulness-Based Business
description:
About Us

We are launching an innovative mindfulness program designed specifically for mothers — created by a medical oncologist and certified mindfulness teacher who understands the challenges of balancing motherhood with a professional life. This is a meaningful opportunity to support women on their wellness journey while joining a purposeful, heart-led business from the ground up.



Position: Executive Virtual Assistant & Content Support

Type: Part-time (20–30 hrs/week) | Location: Remote | Start: ASAP

Compensation: $4+ USD/hour (based on experience) + bonuses



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented, proactive, and compassionate Virtual Assistant to help support the launch and daily operations of our mindfulness program for mothers. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, tech-savvy, and aligned with the mission of supporting maternal wellbeing through mindfulness.



Key Responsibilities

Administrative Support

- Manage
 correspondence and program inquiries

- Schedule appointments and Zoom sessions

- Maintain participant records and Google Sheets

- Respond to customer support questions with empathy and professionalism

- Prepare and organize course materials and resources



Marketing & Social Media

- Create and schedule content across Instagram and LinkedIn

- Support blog post formatting and newsletter scheduling (Substack or similar)

- Assist with
 marketing campaigns (e.g. ConvertKit or Flodesk)

- Engage with community comments and messages

- Use Canva to create on-brand graphics or quotes



Program Operations

- Handle participant registration and payment tracking

- Send welcome
s and onboarding materials

- Manage waitlists and follow-up communication

- Track engagement and feedback using surveys or spreadsheets

- Support the tech setup of online sessions and live courses



Research & Content Support

- Conduct research on mindfulness trends and competitor offerings

- Organize testimonials and case studies

- Help develop course resources or slides

- Support creation of PDFs, guides, or simple educational tools



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of Virtual Assistant or remote support experience

- Strong written and verbal English skills

- Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

- Experience managing social media and scheduling content

- Canva or basic design experience

- Reliable internet and quiet work environment

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple deadlines



???? Preferred (But Not Required)

- Familiarity with the wellness, coaching, or healthcare space

- Experience with ConvertKit, Mailchimp, or other
 tools

- Knowledge of WordPress or basic website content updates

- Experience with scheduling tools (Calendly, Acuity)

- Prior customer service experience

- Interest in or personal experience with mindfulness or maternal health



Personal Qualities We Value

- Empathy for the experiences of mothers

- Proactive and resourceful problem-solver

- Calm, kind, and professional communication style

- Ability to adapt to changing needs in a growing business

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently

- Discretion and ability to handle sensitive information



Work Details

- Hours: 20–30 hours per week (flexible with partial PST overlap)

- Schedule: Monday–Friday, occasional weekend support during launch periods

- Duration: Initial 3-month contract with potential for long-term work

- Setup: Fully remote



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive hourly rate ($4+ USD/hour depending on experience)

- Launch performance bonuses

- Increased hours/responsibilities as the business grows

- Learning opportunities in the mindfulness/wellness industry



To Apply

Please send the following:

- Updated resume with relevant VA or admin experience

- Short cover letter explaining your interest in maternal wellness and this role

- Portfolio (e.g. Canva graphics, sample social posts, admin tools you’ve used)

- 2 professional references

- A brief video intro (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and why you're applying



 Subject Line:

"VA Application – Mindfulness Program Support – [Your Name]"



In your application, please briefly address:

- Your experience working with wellness, healthcare, or coaching clients

- How you prioritize tasks during busy launches or program periods

- How you would support overwhelmed mothers with empathy

- Your availability and preferred working hours



We’re looking for a long-term partner who is looking to grow and expand with us, turning into a full time position in the near future. 

If you're organized, thoughtful, and excited about helping mothers find more calm, clarity, and connection — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Creative Strategist/High Performing Short Form Video Editor for DTC Short-Form Video Ads
description:
Creative Strategist/High performance Video Editor - Short Form Video Ads for Passion Driven Brands, Short Form Ads that delivers proven results. 

Remote | Philippines | 

$500 USD per client per month | $2,000–$2,500 USD per month at full capacity (4-5 clients approx)



Eloura Creative is a short form video performance agency working with North American DTC brands in pet, ethical beauty, plant based food and sustainable lifestyle. Founded by Jason in Melbourne, Australia and Megan from Vancouver, Canada.



The Role

This is not just a video editor role.

You will edit and think strategically. Hooks, concepts, angles, briefs and performance strategy are just as important as the edit itself.



When we land a client you start. One client becomes two, two becomes three. At four to five clients you are earning $2,000–$2,500 per month. At that point we hire editors beneath you and you step into Head of Creative — driving the creative direction of the whole department.

Annual compensation reviews and performance based structures will be introduced as we grow. If you help us build this you will be rewarded for it.

This is a contractor role and will be highly secure for the right candidate. You are free to manage your own projects in your own time provided client work for Eloura Creative is delivered reliably and to a high standard. We completely understand that at the beginning you may need to manage your own work while we grow your client portfolio. The huge upside for you is that you will be paid for the work you deliver, not by the hour. 



What You Need To Be Strong At

Proven track record: Hook writing and direct response creative. DTC ecommerce. Meta and TikTok ad formats. UGC style content. North American consumer psychology. Editing for retention and conversion — you will be editing video yourself in the early stage. Explaining your creative decisions clearly. Taking ownership without needing constant direction.



Proficiency In

Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut and Canva. Experience with AI content generation tools including HeyGen, Kling, Sora, ElevenLabs and Veo3 is a strong advantage.



Our Clients

Our clients are founder led, mission driven North American DTC brands. Their customers care deeply about values, ethics, pets, health, beauty and sustainability. The creative cannot feel generic. You need to already have strong instinct for how this market thinks and buys.



This Is For You If

You think like a strategist not just an editor. You want to join early and grow with a company. You care about brands with a genuine mission. You can explain why a hook works or why it fails. You want long term opportunity not another short term contract.



Application Task

Pick any DTC brand in pet, beauty, plant based or wellness. Write three hooks for a short form video ad targeting their customer. For each hook tell us in one sentence why it works.



To Apply

Send your portfolio, work history, availability and application task to 
].

Subject line: Creative Lead Application, Eloura Creative.????????????????



A Note From Our Founder: 



When I started this company I had three missions.

The first was to build a purpose driven business we can be proud of. By pledging to donate 2% of our total revenue from invoice one to Wildlife Warriors, founded by Steve and Terri Irwin and continued today by Bindi and Robert, we are doing exactly that. This organisation does so much for our beautiful wildlife here in Australia and across the globe. I have always loved animals, but helping from the safety of our office might be the way to go for now at least.



The second was to help passion driven brands grow. I truly believe every dollar we spend is a vote for what we believe in. By helping other passion driven brands, we ensure that money flows to people who deserve it.



The third was to change people’s lives. When I d
 to start this company, I set out some big goals, not just for our company company, but for people like you, who have the talent, who have the proof, but need the right opportunity to showcase that ability. 



If you are able to work with us and support us during our growth phase, you will be rewarded for your dedication and commitment. To us you are not just another employee. Your work matters and so do you. We want to build a long term partnership that ensures we grow together.



We are a new agency and we are being upfront about that. We are actively onboarding our first clients now and we are building this properly from day one. If you are someone who wants to join something early, grow with it and be genuinely rewarded for the part you play in building it, this is for you.

title: Shopify ecommerce accountant for US LLC
description:
About the role

We're a US-based Shopify ecommerce business looking for a detail-oriented accountant/bookkeeper to own our day-to-day books and keep our finances clean and audit-ready. You'll work closely with ownership and hand off to a CPA for final tax filing your job is to make sure everything is organized and accurate before it gets there.



Responsibilities

Maintain accurate books using QuickBooks (reconcile Shopify revenue, returns, and fees)

Prepare monthly and quarterly profit & loss statements

Manage and reconcile multiple bank accounts and payment processors

Track COGS and maintain accurate inventory valuation

Monitor US sales tax thresholds across states and flag when nexus obligations are triggered (filing handled by a third party)

Prepare organized, CPA-ready reports and documentation for annual tax filing

Manage accounts payable and receivable

Track and file 1099s for contractors as needed

Assist with cash flow tracking and forecasting



Requirements:

Proven experience with Shopify ecommerce accounting

Proficient in QuickBooks Online (certification a plus)

Strong understanding of US ecommerce tax obligations — especially sales tax nexus rules (economic nexus thresholds by state)

Experience with multi-bank account reconciliation

Familiarity with US LLC accounting and general business tax structures

Experience preparing books for CPA handoff / tax season

Highly organized, self-managed, and reliable with deadlines

title: Sales Closer, Forex Automated Trading (Remote Full-Time)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing company operating at the intersection of forex trading, financial education, and entrepreneurial automation. We build and sell Expert Advisors (EAs) on MT5 that help traders automate their strategies and grow their accounts and we're expanding our sales team to keep up with demand.



This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company moving fast. If you know trading, love selling, and want to be part of something being built right now, read on.



The Role

We're looking for a driven Sales Closer who can handle both warm inbound leads and self-sourced outbound prospects. You'll be talking to traders every day people who already understand the space, so your credibility and product knowledge matter just as much as your closing skills.



You won't be reading from a script. You'll be having real conversations, understanding where prospects are in their trading journey, and presenting our solutions with confidence.



What You'll Do

Handle inbound leads generated through our marketing channels and close them on discovery/sales calls

Proactively identify and reach out to potential clients through outbound prospecting

Manage your pipeline across multiple CRM systems, keeping everything clean and up to date

Follow up consistently and nurture leads that aren't ready to buy yet

Meet and exceed monthly sales targets

Collaborate with the team on objection handling, product feedback, and process improvements



What We're Looking For

Minimum 2 years of personal trading experience, with hands-on knowledge of MT5

Solid understanding of forex markets, EAs, and automated trading concepts

Proven track record in sales, you can point to real results

Confident communicator, comfortable on video calls and in written follow-ups

Self-starter who can manage their own pipeline without being micromanaged

Experienced with CRM tools (we use multiple systems, adaptability is key)

Excellent written and spoken English



Compensation

Base salary: $900 USD/month

Commission: Percentage per deal closed (discussed in interview)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week

Location: 100% remote, work from anywhere



How to Apply

We respect your time, and we ask you to respect ours.

To be considered, your application must include all three of the following:



A proven CV, show us your sales track record and relevant experience. Numbers, results, and context. Not a generic resume.

Demonstrated knowledge, show us you actually understand what we do. 



Prove you know forex, MT5, and automated trading. Generic applications make it obvious you didn't read this post.



A message explaining why you're the strongest fit, not a copy-paste intro. Tell us specifically why your background, skills, and mindset make you the right person for this role.



If your application is missing any of these three, you will not receive a response. No exceptions.



If you're serious, this should take you 15 minutes. If it feels like too much effort, this role isn't for you.

title: Lead Mangement and CRM Nurture
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to take ownership of our inbound lead management process. You'll be the first point of contact for new leads coming through our digital advertising campaigns, responsible for qualifying them, sending quotes, and guiding them through our nurture pipeline until they're ready to convert.

This is a fully text-based role — you will never be required to make voice calls. All communication with leads happens through 
 and
 Messenger, managed entirely within GoHighLevel. If you're someone who thrives on process, takes pride in prompt and professional communication, and enjoys seeing leads move through a pipeline, this role is a great fit.



What You'll Be Doing



Monitoring and responding to all inbound lead submissions generated through Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns

Engaging new leads quickly and professionally via 
 and
 Messenger through 

Gathering the information needed to prepare accurate, tailored quotes

Creating and sending quotes to leads through GoHighLevel

Progressing leads through the correct stages of our CRM pipeline based on their responses and engagement

Executing manual follow-up touchpoints within our lead nurture workflows

Keeping lead records, tags, notes, and pipeline statuses accurate and up to date

Flagging hot leads, stalled conversations, or anything requiring escalation to the relevant tea
mber

Providing regular updates on pipeline activity and lead status as required





Tools You'll Be Working With



GoHighLevel (GHL) — Your primary platform for everything: CRM pipeline management, 
 and
 Messenger conversations, quote creation and delivery, and workflow execution. Solid hands-on experience is essential.

Meta Ads Manager — You won't be running ads, but you need a basic understanding of how
 Lead Ads work so you can contextualise the leads coming into the pipeline.

 Messenger (via GHL) — All
 lead communications are handled through the GoHighLevel inbox connected to our business page.

SMS (via GHL) — Standard text messaging for outreach, follow-up, and nurture.

Google Workspace — For internal reporting and communication with the wider team.





Requirements

Must-Have



Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — specifically CRM pipelines, the conversations inbox (SMS and DM), and creating/sending quotes or estimates

Strong written English skills — professional, clear, and personable

Ability to manage multiple active leads simultaneously without letting anything slip through

High attention to detail and strong organisational habits

Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet connection and a suitable home working setup

Consistent availability during agreed working hours



Nice-to-Have



Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager and how
 Lead Ad submissions are generated

Prior experience in a sales support, lead management, or customer service role

Experience working with clients or businesses based in Australia, the US, or the UK

Understanding of basic sales funnel and lead nurture concepts





What We Offer



100% remote — work from home

No voice calls, ever — all communication is written, via 
 and
 Messenger through 

A clear, documented process to follow from day one

Competitive pay based on experience

Opportunity to grow with the business as lead volume increases





How to Apply

Please send us the following:



A short written cover letter explaining your GoHighLevel experience and why you're a strong fit for this role

A breakdown of the specific GHL features you've used (e.g. pipelines, conversations, quotes/estimates, workflows, tags)

Your availability (hours per day and days per week) and your expected rate

At least one reference or example demonstrating previous remote work in a similar role



Applications that do not clearly demonstrate GoHighLevel experience will not be considered.

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: We’re Hiring: SEO Strategist (Philippines-Based)
description:
I’m Dustin, founder of Marketing Done Right, a Cleveland-based digital marketing agency. We’re on the lookout for a motivated SEO Strategist to join our Philippines-based crew and take ownership of client projects.



About Us

Marketing Done Right is a close-knit digital marketing agency that delivers top-tier Local SEO and National SEO solutions. We pride ourselves on collaboration, innovation, and helping our tea
mbers grow professionally while delivering measurable results for our clients.





Why Join Us?

Supportive Team Culture – Work with a collaborative, international team where your contributions truly matter.

Career Growth – Long-term role with opportunities to grow and advance.

Performance-Based Salary Increase – Strong results and consistent performance can lead to salary growth.

Diverse Projects – Lead SEO strategies across a variety of client accounts and industries.

Job Stability – We’re in it for the long run and are looking for someone who is, too.





Role (Overview of the Position)



This position will be responsible for leading the strategy and planning of assigned client SEO projects. The strategist will execute these strategies through MDR’s pod and support systems, working with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, VAs, and the content team. This role involves taking clear ownership of assigned projects, ensuring strategies are aligned with client goals, guided by data, and carried through effectively from planning to delivery.



Responsibilities (Tasks Associated with the Role)



- Manage multiple client projects simultaneously while ensuring quality, focus, and on-time delivery.

- Lead the strategy and planning for assigned client SEO projects.

- Create monthly reports to show progress, highlight wins, and identify opportunities for improvement.

- Collaborate with the content team by suggesting topics and outlining content deliverables for each month.

- Work with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, and VAs within the pod system to execute strategies effectively.

- Oversee timelines, deliverables, and workflows to ensure projects are managed smoothly from start to finish.

- Conduct audits, keyword research, and performance reviews to inform data-driven decisions.

- Provide guidance, direction, and feedback to pod members to maintain alignment and quality.

- Develop and maintain SEO documents (such as strategies, audits, and reports) for both internal use and client reporting.

- Take ownership of project outcomes, ensuring strategies stay on track and aligned with client goals.



Results (Expected Accomplishments)



- Assigned SEO projects are delivered with clear direction, steady progress, and alignment to client business objectives.

- Multiple client accounts are handled efficiently, with competing priorities balanced without delays or quality issues.

- Monthly reports consistently highlight wins, performance insights, and opportunities, equipping leadership with valuable talking points for client updates.

- Content deliverables are strategically planned, ensuring each piece contributes to improved visibility and rankings.

- Pod collaboration is seamless, with Specialists, Supports, and VAs executing tasks on time and to standard.

- Timelines, workflows, and deliverables are proactively managed, preventing bottlenecks and ensuring smooth project flow.

- Audits and keyword research regularly uncover growth opportunities, guiding smarter decision-making.

- Performance reviews lead to tangible strategy adjustments that improve traffic, rankings, or conversions.

- Leadership receives accurate, well-structured documentation that strengthens client communication and trust.

- Strategists demonstrate effective delegation and feedback, resulting in stronger team performance and accountability within pods.

- Campaigns remain adaptable to changing client needs or market conditions without losing 
ntum.

- Projects demonstrate consistent alignment with MDR’s quality standards and brand reputation.

- Workload across multiple clients is prioritized effectively, ensuring no project falls behind schedule.

- Collaboration with the content team results in deliverables that not only support SEO but also enhance overall marketing strategy.

- Client satisfaction is reinforced by clear communication, visible progress, and the strategist’s ownership of outcomes.

- Strategists show the ability to anticipate potential challenges and address them before they become roadblocks.

- Reports and strategies are presented in a way that simplifies complex data into actionable insights.

- Campaign outcomes contribute to MDR’s larger goal of delivering measurable growth and value for clients.





Requirements (Expected Proficiencies)



- Proven experience in SEO strategy, including keyword research, audits, and data-driven decision-making.

- Strong understanding of SEO best practices, local SEO, analytics, and reporting tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, etc.).

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple client accounts at the same time without losing focus on quality or deadlines.

- Skilled in creating SEO documents for both client reporting and internal use (such as strategies, reports, and project plans) that clearly outline progress, insights, and next steps.

- Experience working closely with cross-functional teams (such as content, design, development, PPC, and virtual assistants) to ensure deliverables align with SEO strategies and client goals.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, both written and verbal.

- Ability to think critically, stay calm under pressure, and find solutions in urgent or challenging situations.

- Comfortable giving direction, feedback, and guidance to tea
mbers to keep projects on track.

- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to keep timelines and deliverables moving smoothly.

- Familiarity with the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and digital marketing practices.





How to Apply

Interested applicants must fill out this Google Form to be considered:

title: IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role offers a unique blend of IT project implementation and day-to-day technical support responsibilities, providing an excellent opportunity to grow your skills in a supportive and collaborative environment.



As an IT Engineer, you will play a key role in maintaining and improving our clients’ IT environments, troubleshooting issues, and contributing to exciting IT projects. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and delivering exceptional service, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

**Provide Level 2 technical support for hardware, software, and network issues, escalating complex problems as needed.

*Plan and implement IT projects, ensuring timely and successful delivery.

*Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, servers, and networks.

*Perform PC maintenance, upgrades, and installations.

*Manage and support user equipment, software, and services remotely.

*Document work thoroughly and update the ticketing system to ensure transparency and efficiency.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

*Operating Systems: Windows and Mac desktop environments, Windows Server.

*Networking: Cisco, Ubiquiti, Fortinet, and general networking concepts.

*Cloud Platforms: Microsoft 365 and Azure.



What We’re Looking For:

**Experienced L2 IT Support role

*Strong troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and networks.

*Familiarity with Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and networking concepts.

*Excellent communication and customer service skills.

*A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Preferred but Not Required:

*Certifications such as Network+, Microsoft Certified, or CCNA.

*Experience with firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (3136) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST or 2:00 PM -11:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Mortgage Broking Virtual Assistant (AU Experience Required)
description:
I am are looking for an experienced Mortgage Broking Virtual Assistant to support one of my businesses and my mortgage broking team with loan processing, client communication, and admin tasks.



IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING Do NOT apply if:

You do not have experience supporting Australian mortgage brokers

You are not familiar with AU mortgage processes or tools



This role is ideal for:

Mortgage broking VAs with real AU experience

Loan processing assistants

Admin support who have worked inside broker teams or lending companies

Please send your CV link and follow the instructions carefully:

Key Responsibilities

Manage and update client files and CRM systems

Collect and organize supporting documents (IDs, payslips, bank statements, etc.)

Coordinate with brokers, lenders, and clients for updates

Follow up on applications and track progress

Nice to Have

Experience with lender portals and submissions

Understanding of compliance requirements in AU lending

Experience working directly with brokers and clients



Benefits:

Day shift (Philippine Time)

HMO Benefits

WFH

title: AI Content Creator (VEO 3.1)
description:
We are looking for a skilled and reliable AI Video Content Creator for a long-term, stable, and well-paid position.

We are looking for someone who:



-has experience with AI-generated video content

-can follow instructions closely

-has a good eye for visuals, pacing, and scene flow

-is organized, fast, and dependable

-can edit and assemble videos cleanly in CapCut



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants a serious long-term role with consistent work and room to grow.



When applying, please finish the form down below to apply for the position:

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
About the Role:



We're looking for a self-motivated SDR to generate qualified appointments for our sales team through smart, targeted outreach. This is a high-impact role and your work directly drives our growth.



What You'll Do:



Research and identify target companies

Send personalized cold
s using our proven templates

Source warm leads from job sites (Indeed, Upwork)

Conduct discovery calls with prospects

Qualify leads using our 6-point framework

Pass 2-4 qualified appointments/week to the sales executive



Tools You'll Use:



Apollo (prospecting &
)

Claude AI (research assistance)

GHL (CRM/pipeline)

Google Meet (video calls)

Hubstaff (time tracking & accountability)



What Makes You Great:



2+ years B2B sales or SDR experience

Relevant Work Experience in sales, lead generation, or SDR roles

Excellent written and spoken English proficiency (this is 70% of the job)

Self-directed with strong commitment to role & availability (weekly check-ins, not daily micromanagement)

Professionalism & positive attitude

Comfortable with rejection (it’s part of the game)

Coachable and willing to learn & adapt

Experience with US business culture

Remote Work Experience & Adaptability

Strong Time Management & Dependability

Problem-Solving Skills

Response Time & Clarity in communications

Technical proficiency with sales and CRM tools

Internet & Work Setup reliable for remote work



Nice to Have:



Experience with Apollo or similar tools

Background in digital marketing, HR solutions, or offshore staffing

Track record of exceeding SDR quotas



What We Provide:



Comprehensive training

All tools and systems set up for you

Proven templates and frameworks

Weekly coaching and support

Clear path to increased hours/compensation



Schedule:



Monday-Friday, 4 hours/day



Success Metrics:



2-4 qualified appointments set per week

80%+ appointment show rate

Positive feedback from sales executive



To Apply:



Submit resume

Answer: "Describe your ideal day as an SDR"

Answer: "A prospect says 'send me information' - how do you respond?"

Send a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself

title: Business Development Representative (Events)
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for two part-time Business Development Representatives to support the Executive Producer with outbound prospecting, CRM management, and appointment setting. This is a ground-floor opportunity because there is no existing lead list. The right candidates will be resourceful self-starters who know how to find, qualify, and engage prospects independently, while maintaining discipline in time tracking and productivity.



Key Responsibilities



Research and generate leads using LinkedIn, AI tools, and online research, guided by a detailed Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

Manage HubSpot CRM: organize the pipeline, classify leads, build and run workflows, and log all activity

Conduct outbound calls using the HubSpot dialer during EST business hours

Send LinkedIn messages and outreach
s on behalf of the Executive Producer

Book qualified discovery appointments directly onto the Executive Producer's calendar

Maintain complete relationship tracking across all touchpoints in HubSpot

Work toward a combined running average of 5 qualified appointments per week

Execute approximately 500 manual outreach touchpoints per month across all channels

Accurately track work hours and activity using Hubstaff, ensuring transparency and accountability



Required Qualifications



Hands-on HubSpot experience: workflows, sequences, lead classification, dialer, and calendar integration are required, not preferred

Proven outbound B2B sales background: cold calling, objection handling, and appointment setting

Excellent spoken and written English with no communication barrier

Strong independent research skills using LinkedIn and AI tools

Ability to work without day-to-day supervision

Availability during 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST, and 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM EST, Monday through Friday



Evaluation Criteria



Candidates will be assessed based on the following:



Relevant Work Experience

Software & Technical Proficiency

Remote Work Experience & Adaptability

English Proficiency (Spoken & Written)

Professionalism & Attitude

Response Time & Clarity

Internet & Work Setup

Commitment to Role & Availability

Time Management & Dependability

Problem-Solving Skills

Willingness to Learn & Adapt

Hubstaff Usage (accuracy, consistency, and integrity in time tracking)



Ideal Candidate Profile



Has built B2B pipelines before and not just worked pre-existing ones

Understands long sales cycles and relationship-driven outreach

Tracks their own activity and output without being prompted

Receives feedback and adjusts quickly

Has experience in events, hospitality, tech, pharma, or professional services (a plus, not a requirement)



Application Instructions



To be considered for this role, please complete the application form and submit the required materials:



Fill out the application form here: 
/applicant-form/cc75295ffa2c
b061d541e2e&&ff29e11eb076d
e4d15a2a77

Submit your most recent CV

Submit a short introduction video (1–2 minutes) highlighting your relevant experience and communication skills



Only applicants who complete all requirements will be reviewed.

title: Sales Manager in visa support department
description:
Work Vision Group is a Filipino-friendly employment agency based in Poland. In constantly changing economic environment our company helps people to find work opportunities in Poland.

Work Vision Group has a strong reputation for being reliable and trustworthy and is known for its excellent customer service. You can check services we provide on our website 



Currently we are expanding our Sales Department (visa support services) and looking for motivated Sales Manager to join our team and help Filipino to transfer for better job and life opportunities in Poland. 



Key requirements in order of priority:

- English— confident conversational level B2

- you have experience working with people

- organized and able to set priorities, you don't need an office to work well

- you have a desire to learn and constantly improve your level of professionalism

- you dream of becoming a specialist in the international market

- own PC or laptop and headset

- good internet connection



Responsibilities and functionality:

- processing incoming applications from website in CRM system (NOT cold calls)

- advising potential customers of the company's services 

- ensuring a high level of communication and interaction with clients

- help on the transfer of documents and calculations

- entering information into the CRM system



Remuneration:

- stable rate of $450 

- $25 extra for each client who ordered the company's services: 4-10 people per month (depending on your productivity) means plus $100 or $250 as a monthly bonus. That means your total monthly income can range up to $700.



Bonus for Exceeding Targets

Starting from Month 4, managers receive additional bonuses for each sale beyond 7:

• 8–9 sales/month: +$10 per additional sale

• 10+ sales/month: +$15 per additional sale



We offer:

- full support at all stages of training

- all necessary product and company training documents + scripts of key negotiation options

- remote work, convenient work schedule

- working hours from 09:00 to 18:00 from Mon. to Fri. (possible to choose flexible schedule, we are interested in results)

- paid probation and trainee periods (5 training days and 5 practice days: will be paid in case of successful completement)

- paid salary in time (up to 20th every month)

- the ability to keep a high level of English while communicating with potential foreign clients



If you are interested in a career in sales and think you fit the bill - leave your feedback here attaching your CV or send it directly to WhatsApp 
We are waiting for talented and ambitious candidates! See you at the interview!

title: Canva Worksheet Production Assistant for Children’s Printable Brand
description:
I’m looking for a reliable Canva assistant to help create printable worksheets for a children’s educational brand called Little Learning Bugs.



This is for early-years / preschool / Reception-age learning resources. The products will include printable worksheets, activity packs, Canva templates, Etsy listing images, bundle previews, and simple product graphics.



This can become regular ongoing work for the right person.



ABOUT THE BRAND



Little Learning Bugs has 5 bug characters, and each one has a learning role:



* Luna the Ladybird = maths, counting, numbers, addition, more/fewer

* Stanley the Snail = writing, pencil control, tracing, handwriting

* Clive the Caterpillar = phonics, early reading, sounds, CVC words

* Belle the Butterfly = creativity, colouring, patterns, emotions

* Bess the Bee = puzzles, mazes, sequencing, review activities



I will provide the character images, logo, worksheet topics, examples, and detailed briefs.



WHAT I NEED HELP WITH



You will create clean, child-friendly printable worksheets in Canva.



Tasks may include:



* A4 portrait printable worksheets

* Canva editable worksheet templates

* early maths worksheets

* pencil control worksheets

* tracing worksheets

* phonics worksheets

* colouring and creativity pages

* mazes and puzzles

* Etsy product covers

* Etsy listing images

* bundle preview images

* PDF exports



IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS



You must be able to:



* Use Canva confidently

* Create clean, professional worksheet layouts

* Follow detailed instructions exactly

* Keep branding consistent

* Use editable Canva text, not flattened image text

* Use provided character images and assets

* Avoid random clipart unless approved

* Keep worksheets printer-friendly with mostly white backgrounds

* Create child-friendly designs suitable for young children

* Share editable Canva links

* Export finished PDFs

* Work in organised batches with agreed prices and deadlines

* Return small tasks quickly when possible



Fast turnaround is important. For small worksheet batches, I would like someone who can often return work the same day or within 24 hours, depending on the size of the task. Please mention your usual turnaround time when applying.



WORKING STYLE



This will be batch-based work at first, not monthly salary.



For example:



* 2-page paid test

* 10-page worksheet batch

* reusable Canva template set

* Etsy listing image set

* full printable pack



Each batch will have a clear brief, agreed price, and deadline.



FIRST PAID TEST TASK



The first test task will be a small paid Canva task to check quality, communication, speed, Canva skill, and ability to follow the brand style.



PLEASE REPLY WITH:



1. Your Canva experience

2. Examples of children’s worksheets, printables, educational resources, or Etsy designs you have made

3. Your price for 10 simple A4 worksheet pages using provided assets

4. Your price for a reusable Canva worksheet template set

5. Your price for 5 Etsy listing images

6. Your turnaround time for 10 worksheet pages

7. Whether you can often complete small tasks within 24 hours

8. Confirmation that you can provide editable Canva links and PDF exports

9. Your availability each week



Please only apply if you are comfortable following detailed instructions and creating consistent, printer-friendly Canva worksheets.



Thank you.
salary: $2–$4 per worksheet page, paid per batch

title: Executive Assistant with Sales Experience
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Executive Assistant to support a busy CEO. This role is focused on protecting the executive’s time, maintaining strong organization across tasks and priorities, and providing operational support that allows leadership to focus on strategic work.



The ideal candidate is someone who is dependable, detail-oriented, and capable of anticipating needs while managing multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Provide executive assistant support to help manage schedules, priorities, and day-to-day administrative tasks



Maintain organization across calendars, communications, and task management systems



Help protect the executive’s time by coordinating meetings and managing scheduling logistics



Assist with outbound sales support, including outreach and follow-ups when needed



Provide light marketing support to help generate opportunities and maintain visibility



Support general administrative and operational tasks as needed



Qualifications



Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role



Strong organizational and time-management skills



Excellent written and verbal English communication



Ability to work independently and manage priorities with minimal supervision



Professional, reliable, and highly detail-oriented



Comfortable supporting executives in a fast-paced environment



Ideal Candidate



Highly organized and proactive



Able to anticipate needs and solve problems independently



Comfortable supporting both administrative and growth-related activities (sales support, light marketing)



Flexible with hours and able to adapt to changing priorities



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys supporting leadership, creating structure, and helping a growing business operate more efficiently.

title: Part-Time Customer Support Agent (Spanish / Shopify / Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Agent to help manage daily customer inquiries for our growing Spanish fashion dropshipping store.



Your main tasks will include:



Responding to customer
s and messages (in Spanish)

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

TThe Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Family Law Legal Assistant
description:
DO NOT CALL THE OFFICE ABOUT THIS POSITION. ALL CANDIDATES WHO CALL THE OFFICE WILL IMMEDIATELY BE DISQUALIFIED FROM THIS POSITION. 



MUST SUBMIT A ONE MINUTE VOICE RECORDING

MUST HAVE DUAL MONITORS 



We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented experienced legal assistant l to join our legal team. The ideal candidate will assist attorney in all stages of litigation, from case inception to resolution. The legal assistant will be responsible for organizing documents, conducting legal research, drafting legal documents, and providing overall support to ensure efficient case management.



Responsibilities:

Assist attorneys in preparing legal documents for court filings, including pleadings, motions, and briefs.

Organize and manage case files, including electronic and physical documents, ensuring all materials are easily accessible and up-to-date.

Conduct legal research using various resources, such as online databases and legal libraries, to support attorneys in case preparation.



Assist in the preparation of discovery requests and responses, including drafting interrogatories, requests for production, and document reviews.



Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and other parties involved in the litigation process to schedule meetings, depositions, and court appearances.



Prepare trial exhibits, demonstratives, and other visual aids for use during hearings and trials.

Assist attorneys during trial proceedings, including managing exhibits, taking notes, and providing overall trial support.

Maintain communication with clients regarding case updates and developments, under the supervision of attorneys.

Assist with administrative tasks, such as billing, timekeeping, and calendar management, to ensure efficient workflow within the legal team. Stay current with changes in relevant laws, regulations, and court rules to ensure compliance and effective case management.



Requirements: 

While we train you in our practice areas and procedures, we will not train you to be a paralegal. You must already understand the terminology and begin legal drafting from Day 1. 

Do not apply if you do not have this skill.





Attention to detail. The attorney requires attention to details to limit mistakes in document preparation and in following instructions.

Organization must be a high priority for the right candidate.

Strong drafting skills. Must be able to draft detailed demand letters, motions, notices, discovery, etc.

Previous experience working as a litigation paralegal in a law firm or legal department.

Proficiency in legal research and writing, with strong analytical and critical thinking skills.

Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines effectively.

Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact professionally with attorneys, clients, and other stakeholders.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite and legal software applications, such as Westlaw or LexisNexis.

Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information with discretion.

Organization. Must be able to keep track of all time in the firm’s billing system. You are paid based on the time you bill in the attorney’s case management system.

Must be a self-starter and honest. This is a remote position and is based upon a position of trust with the firm.



Preferred Qualifications:

Strong English

Familiarity with electronic discovery (e-discovery) tools and procedures.

Experience with trial preparation and support, including courtroom technology and procedures.

Join our team and play a vital role in supporting our attorneys in delivering high-quality legal services to our clients.
