title: Appointment Setter (Outbound)
description:
Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound)



Starlight Marketing is looking for a reliable and confident Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound) to support our outreach efforts by scheduling qualified calls for the team.



In this role, your main responsibility is to connect with potential prospects, introduce our services using a provided script, and book appointments for interested individuals. You will not be closing sales — your focus is on starting conversations and securing scheduled meetings.



What your day will look like:

-Making outbound calls to assigned leads

-Following a structured script to introduce our services

-Answering basic questions and handling simple objections

-Booking qualified prospects into the calendar

-Logging call outcomes accurately in the tracking system



Technical Requirements:

-Must have your own laptop or desktop computer

-Minimum 8GB RAM

-Stable internet connection with at least 30 Mbps speed



Experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, or outbound calling is a plus but not required. Training and scripts will be provided for the right candidate who is coachable and motivated.



This is a remote, long-term opportunity with stable hours and performance-based growth potential as Starlight Marketing continues to grow.



If you’re confident on the phone, fully available, and motivated by booking appointments and hitting targets, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Learner Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Learner Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Web Designer & Funnel Builder
description:
About Us

We're a business coaching company helping personal trainers, nutritionists, and health coaches build profitable online businesses using paid ads and funnel systems. Our brand is growing and our pages need to reflect that — clean, intentional design that builds trust and converts.

What This Role Is

This is a web design role first. You'll design and build pages, funnels, and visual assets for our brand and for our coaching clients. We use GoHighLevel as our primary platform — but we're hiring for design skill, not platform knowledge. If you have a strong design eye and funnel experience in any platform, we can work with that.

We need someone who looks at a page and immediately sees what's off — and knows exactly how to fix it. If your default move is to grab a template and call it done, this isn't the right fit.

Long-term is the goal. My last hire was with me for 8 years.

What You'll Do

Web Design — this is the job



Design high-converting landing pages, sales pages, opt-in pages, and thank-you pages from concept to finished product

Translate our brand guide into every page you touch — fonts, colours, spacing, tone

Design for our brand and build to the same standard across coaching client accounts

Create social media graphics, ad creatives, and visual assets in Canva

Look at existing pages and tell us honestly what's not working and why



GoHighLevel



Build and publish your designs directly in GHL

Set up funnel-connected automations —
 sequences, basic triggers, tagging, pipeline steps

Implement webinar flows, order forms, and checkout pages

Clone and customise across client accounts

Maintain and troubleshoot existing builds



You Must Have



A strong portfolio of web pages and funnel designs you've built — this is the first and most important thing we look at

Proven ability to design pages that look intentional, not templated

Canva proficiency

Funnel builder experience in GHL, ClickFunnels, Kajabi, or similar — willingness to learn GHL fast if needed

Fluent written English

Reliable internet and a self-managed work style — you own your tasks without being chased



Bonus Points



Experience supporting a coaching or course-based business

Basic HTML/CSS to push designs further than the platform allows

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager

AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) used in your workflow



How to Apply

 
 with:



Your portfolio — live links or screenshots of pages you've designed and built (no portfolio = no response)

One page or funnel you're proud of and a sentence on what makes it work

Your hourly rate



This Isn't For You If…



Your portfolio is mostly stock templates with a logo swapped out

You need step-by-step direction to stay productive

You bill for hours you're not actively working



Skills: Web Design & Page Layout · GoHighLevel · Funnel Building · Canva



Bonus Points



Experience supporting a coaching or course-based business

Basic HTML/CSS to push designs further than the platform allows

AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) used in your workflow

Podcast or video editing experience (Descript, CapCut, Premiere Pro) — we produce a weekly podcast and YouTube content, and if you can handle basic edits we'll add hours and pay accordingly

title: Head of Operations
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced and results-driven Head of Operations to oversee company-wide performance and ensure all departments are aligned, accountable, and consistently achieving targets.



This role will lead core operational functions, including service delivery, team performance, and KPI management, while working closely with leadership to drive growth and efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



1. Service Delivery Oversight



* Oversee operations across recruitment and client support functions

* Ensure roles are filled on time and service quality remains high

* Maintain strong client satisfaction and retention



2. KPI & Performance Management



* Monitor and review KPIs across multiple departments

* Ensure alignment with company goals and performance targets

* Identify gaps and implement corrective actions



3. Leadership & Team Management



* Manage and support department leads

* Conduct performance reviews and ensure accountability

* Build a culture of ownership, consistency, and continuous improvement



4. Reporting & Dashboard Management



* Oversee operational dashboards and reporting systems

* Ensure accurate tracking of key performance metrics

* Provide insights and reports to leadership



5. Process & Systems Improvement



* Develop and improve SOPs across departments

* Identify inefficiencies and implement scalable systems

* Optimize workflows to support growth



6. Escalation & Problem Solving



* Handle high-level operational or client issues

* Identify root causes and implement long-term solutions

* Reduce recurring issues through improved systems and accountability



Qualifications



Required



* Experience managing operations, recruitment functions, or client-facing teams

* 3–7+ years of experience in operations, leadership, or similar roles

* Proven ability to manage multiple teams or departments

* Strong leadership, accountability, and performance management skills

* Highly organized, process-driven, and systems-oriented

* Data-driven with experience in KPI tracking and reporting

* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment

* Willing to work within a faith-based organization



Ideal Candidate



You are a strong leader who thrives on structure, accountability, and results. You are comfortable managing multiple teams, driving performance, and building systems that support growth and efficiency.



How to Apply



Please submit your resume and briefly describe your experience managing operations, teams, and KPIs.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

title: WordPress Developer
description:
Acclaim is a cozy crew of about 15 folks who are all about crafting super optimized, conversion-focused websites using Webflow, WordPress, and AI tools. We're a bunch of passionate people getting it done!



WHO WE ARE:



Since the beginning 2014 we work in a no-office model. Each member of our team works 100% remotely from a convenient place in Poland. In terms of WordPress, we hate predefined themes, that’s why we create bespoke projects based on our framework which has been developed for more than 7 years. 



The most common recipients of our services are Startups, Software Houses, Agencies and other customers from all over the world. Most of our customers are based in the US, UK, Canada, Australia. All of the projects are managed by a Project Manager and tested by a QA Tester. We settle the working time using Toggl, communicate through Slack, and organize tasks in ClickUp. For more details about our business, 
 





In Acclaim, we are searching for a superhero, who can provide us with full-stack WordPress skills. We are looking for someone who feels comfortable with front-end development and back-end development. Do you think you could be the right fit? 





YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE:



- Strictly working on WordPress maintenance & support projects 

- Being a chameleon who enjoys working on a few different projects in one day, not just one

- Creating semantic Front-End code, which means fully responsive websites in the mobile-first methodology

- Front-End Integration with WordPress using Gutenberg and ACF Blocks

- eCommerce development based on the WooCommerce plugin

- Implementation of external REST APIs

- Development of the dedicated WordPress plugins 

- Website optimization to achieve great scores in PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, and Pingdom Test

- Support of existing WordPress projects which have been built by our team or some external team







WHAT WE EXPECT : 



- Communicational & competent grasp of English Language - B2 (Netflix with no subtitles)

- Commercial experience in WordPress

- Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS3 (SCSS with BEM), Themes structure, Gutenberg Blocks, ACF, Custom Post Types, WooCommerce, Hooks, REST API

- Commercial experience in JavaScript(ES6+)

- Knowledge of design patterns and OOP principles 

- Experience in using the console version of GIT

- Attention to detail and quality of work are MUST HAVE

- Comfortable communicating with customers & being a consultant regarding all technical aspects

- Being able to work with ‘spaghetti’ code & can clean it up so it’s top-notch







NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience in Webpack

- Experience in working remotely

- Fast coding skills and ability to work under time pressure

- Experience in one of the JS frameworks like React / Vue / Angular





WHAT PERKS & BENEFITS YOU GAIN FROM US? 



- 100% remote work forever

- Full support & cooperation during all projects

- Fantastic atmosphere and a team of great in-house developers that you mentor and level-up with

- Ability to influence the company - we value your opinion and nourish a feedback culture







HOW DOES OUR RECRUITMENT PROCESS WORK? 



Our recruitment process is very fast-paced. If you are quick in your participation, so are we. Once we review your CV, and we like what we see, you expect the following to happen: 





Step 1: You will receive an
 with a form to fill out from Kinga our Head of HR. After that form is filled out and sent back, we will reach out to invite you to a video chat. 



Step 2: You will meet face to face via video chat with one of our IT specialists - we want to get to know you better ???? During this meeting you will also be asked to do Live Coding. After you finish your assignment, we will reach out to you either with feedback or a job offer. 



Step 3: You will participate in a quick conversation to finalize the terms of our co-operation. 











LEARN MORE ABOUT US:



For more information about Acclaim & our amazing projects, check out our LinkedIn 

 
 



If you want to get to know us, even further check out what our customers have to say about us 
 





OUR KEY VALUES:



- Focus on the highest quality of coding - web optimization is our beacon!

- Prioritising top-level customer service

- Delivering the projects on time







OUR KEY SERVICES:



- UI/UX Web Design

- Webflow Development

- AI Development

- Wordpress Support & Maintenance

- Figma/XD to WordPress Conversion

- WordPress Plugin Development

- SEO

title: LEAD INTAKE, SALES OUTREACH & STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS COORDINATOR - Executive Growth Role | Childcare Placement & Family
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW



We are a rapidly expanding childcare and family services business focused on helping families secure flexible, high-quality, culturally enriching in-home childcare solutions through structured placement programs.



Our mission:



To provide families with exceptional childcare solutions while delivering outstanding support, communication, and long-term program success.



Growth Vision:



Scale from approximately 20 active families to 100+ active enrolled families by year-end.



This role will play a direct and critical part in driving that expansion.



POSITION OVERVIEW



We are hiring a highly responsive, sales-capable, organized, and relationship-driven coordinator to help fuel business growth through:



Core Functions:



• Lead generation

• Immediate inbound lead response

• Sales outreach

• Appointment setting

• Referral partnership development

• CRM management

• Family enrollment growth



This is NOT a traditional virtual assistant role.



This is a performance-driven business growth role.



STARTING STRUCTURE

20 hours/week (Part-Time)

Growth Opportunity:

PERFORMANCE GROWTH TRACK

Result: Expanded hours and increased responsibility



Milestone 2:

Reach 100 active families by December 31st



Result:



+$2/hour raise

WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

• Sales

• Fast-paced communication

• Relationship building

• Business development

• Structured growth

• Performance incentives



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Immediate Lead Intake & Conversion

Responsibilities:



• Respond to inquiries immediately

• Manage lead stages

• Maintain organization

• Improve systems



REQUIRED SKILLS

MUST HAVE:



• Excellent written English

• Strong phone communication

• Appointment setting experience

• Sales or lead generation background

• CRM proficiency

• Fast response discipline

• Organizational precision

• Strategic thinking

• Independent ownership mentality



DISQUALIFIERS

IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

• Business development

• Sales coordination

• Client success

• Healthcare or family services outreach

• U.S.-based communication roles



DAILY PRIORITIES

Inbound lead response



Priority 2:



Lead follow-up



Priority 3:



Referral network outreach



Priority 4:



CRM updates and operational management



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)



• Leads generated

• Response speed

• Calls booked

• Applications completed

• Families matched

• Referral relationships built

• Pipeline conversion rates



APPLICATION PROCESS (MANDATORY)

1. Personalized Video Submission (MAX 60 seconds)



Include:

• Relevant sales/admin/business development experience

• Why you are a fit for THIS role



2. Sales Writing Test

 or phone script to a pediatric office or doula practice.

5. Subject Line Trap

“
ntum”



Applications missing this word will NOT be reviewed.



COMPENSATION

Competitive hourly, based on experience



Growth:

• +$2/hour raise at 100 active families by year-end



Potential Additional Incentives:



Performance bonuses may be available for strong results.



HOURS

20 hours/week initially

U.S. East Coast business hours required

FINAL NOTE



We are not hiring a passive assistant.



We are hiring someone who can:



Drive leads

Build trust

Create partnerships

title: Social Media Strategist & Content Manager
description:
About Funnel Digital Marketing



Funnel Digital Marketing is a performance marketing agency that brings Fortune 500-level expertise to small and medium-sized businesses. We specialize in paid search, SEO, programmatic advertising, and social media, and we are known for being data-driven, transparent, and genuinely invested in our clients' success. While large agencies reserve their best talent for their biggest accounts, we give every client access to senior-level strategy and execution from day one.



The agency was founded in 2018 and is led by Kenneth Hamner, who has 20 years of experience in digital marketing. Today, Funnel works with clients across a range of industries, delivering measurable results through strategies that are grounded in data and built around each client's specific goals. The agency is growing, and this role is a key part of scaling our lead generation efforts.



The Opportunity



We are looking for a Social Media Strategist & Content Manager who can plan, create, and manage content consistently.

This is a hands-on role. You will be responsible for writing posts, creating simple graphics, and maintaining a consistent presence across our social platforms.

This is not just a “post and forget” role; you should understand what makes content effective and be able to improve it over time.



What You Will Do



Social Media Management & Posting

Manage Funnel’s social media accounts (primarily 
 and
)

Schedule and publish posts consistently

Maintain a content calendar and posting cadence

Ensure content is aligned with brand voice and positioning



Content Creation (Writing + Graphics)

Write social media posts based on briefs, ideas, or raw input

Turn notes, voice ideas, or documents into structured content

Create simple, clean graphics using Canva (or similar tools)

Ensure visuals are consistent with brand style and messaging

Repurpose blogs, decks, and existing materials into posts



Content Strategy Support

Suggest ideas for improving content performance

Help identify what types of content work best

Contribute to improving overall content direction



Engagement & Community

Monitor comments and messages

Respond or flag important interactions

Support basic community engagement



Performance Tracking

Track basic metrics (engagement, consistency, reach)

Identify what is working and suggest improvements



What We Are Looking For



Required

Experience managing social media accounts

Strong writing skills (clear, simple, and structured)

Strong graphic design ability (Canva or similar)

Organized and consistent with execution

Able to work independently without constant supervision



Preferred

Experience with LinkedIn content

Experience creating branded social media visuals

Experience working with agencies or multiple brands



What Success Looks Like



Success in this role is defined by consistency, quality, and reliability.

Content is posted consistently and on schedule, with both writing and visuals aligned to the brand.

Graphics are clean, simple, and professional — not overly designed, but clear and effective.

You are organized, proactive, and able to manage your workload without needing constant follow-up.

Over time, content becomes more structured, more engaging, and more aligned with the agency’s positioning.



Compensation & Setup



This is a contract-based, part-time role.

Time Commitment:

 ~3 hours per day, Monday to Friday (approximately 15 hours per week)

 Work is structured and manageable with clear direction.

Compensation:

 $300 USD per month

Work Style: Fully remote, async

 Tools: Slack, Google Docs/Drive, Canva



This role is ideal for someone who wants to:

Build experience managing a real agency brand

Improve both content and design skills

Work in a structured and consistent environment

Strong performers may be given more responsibility and increased compensation over time.



How to Apply



When applying through OnlineJobs.ph, please assign at least 10 points to your application.

Applications with fewer than 10 points will not be reviewed.



Include:

A short summary of your experience

Examples of posts and graphics you have created

Portfolio, samples, or screenshots of your work



Final Step (Required)

Answer this question in your application:

If you were managing Funnel’s LinkedIn starting next week, what types of content would you post in the first 2–3 weeks?

title: Long-Form YouTube + Reels Editor for Finance Channel — Finance Knowledge Required, 3-Day Turnaround
description:
ABOUT THE CHANNEL

ETF Investments — a growing finance content brand covering ETF education, fund comparisons, and investment strategy. We have 195K+ Instagram followers, 3,500+ newsletter subscribers, and a YouTube channel that we're scaling aggressively.We post 1-2 long-form YouTube videos per week and 2-3 Reels per week. Looking for an editor to own the editing pipeline going forward.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



YouTube long-form (7-10 minutes):

- Edit talking-head footage with B-roll, animations, and transitions

- Add chart overlays, stat callouts, and data visualizations

- Mix on-camera segments with full-screen data sections smoothly

- Color correction, audio cleanup, pacing edits

- Pattern interrupts every 15-20 seconds, zoom cuts during talking head

- Light motion graphics for emphasis on key data points



Instagram Reels (50-70 seconds):

- Talking head + caption overlays

- Punchy, fast-paced cuts

- Stat callouts and ticker mentions visually emphasized



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong English — you'll be working with technical finance terms (ETF, AUM, expense ratio, yield, dividend, sector allocation, basis points). Mistakes here are unacceptable

- Finance / investing literacy — you don't need to be an expert, but you should understand what a stock chart looks like, what a comparison table is, what "expense ratio" means

- Proven editing portfolio with at least 3 long-form YouTube videos (please share links)

- Native video editor in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve (your choice)

- 3-day turnaround per long-form video from raw delivery to first cut

- 2-day turnaround per Reel

- 24-hour turnaround on revisions

- WhatsApp communication

- Available for ongoing work — 1-2 long-form + 2-3 Reels per week



RATES

Reels (50-70 sec): $30

YouTube (7-10 min): $100



HOW TO APPLY

Reply with:

- Portfolio link — at least 2 long-form YouTube edits and 1 short-form (Reel/Short)

- Your typical turnaround time per long-form video and per Reel

- Have you edited finance content before? If yes, link an example

- Confirmation you can complete a paid test edit ($30 for a 2-3 minute YouTube section)

- What time zone you work in and your typical working hours



I will respond within 48 hours to candidates who pass the initial review. Top 2-3 will be invited for a paid test edit. Whoever delivers the best work on time gets the ongoing role.



Test edit: I'll provide 2-3 minutes of raw YouTube footage with a script and written brief. $20 paid via Wise on delivery. Turnaround: 48 hours.



Communication: WhatsApp only.

 and LinkedIn to find active brokers exclusively within Kansas, Nevada, and Ohio.

. You will position this as an "expansion opportunity" to run their own office under our banner.

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media Marketing VA (Full-Time, Remote)



Platforms: Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (New York Time)



About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



This is a hands-on execution role, not a content-only or automation-based position.



All growth is done manually, using real engagement, strategic targeting, and platform-safe best practices.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.



Each analyst manages approximately 10 client accounts and is responsible for executing daily growth activities, tracking performance, and maintaining full visibility through documentation and reporting.



If you are detail-oriented, disciplined, and enjoy structured social media growth work, this role is a strong long-term fit.



Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



No bots, automation tools, or third-party growth apps

All actions are manual and follow strict internal SOPs

Daily documentation, screenshots, and reporting are mandatory

This is a full-time role only (not freelance or part-time)



What You’ll Do



As a Social Media Marketing VA, you will:



Execute manual organic growth across assigned platforms

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

Follow client-approved growth strategies and daily limits

Manage and update daily tracking spreadsheets

Monitor account health, activity, and potential restrictions

Submit weekly summaries and performance updates

Collaborate with Account Manager and Content teams when needed



Job Requirements



To be considered, you must:



Be available full-time only (Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

Have reliable high-speed internet

Be comfortable with daily Slack communication

Have a verified identity

Own both a computer and a mobile phone (required for account access)

Be willing to follow strict SOPs and documentation rules

Commit to long-term employment (not temporary work)



If you cannot work this schedule or follow structured processes, please do not apply.



Skills We’re Looking For



Strong written and spoken English

Familiarity with Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow instructions precisely

Comfortable with repetitive but strategic execution

Prior social media or growth experience is a plus.

Professional, reliable, and accountable



Compensation & Benefits



Fixed monthly salary (paid via PayPal)

Full training and onboarding provided

Opportunities for advancement within the company



About the Team



We are a fully remote team with members across different countries, including the Philippines.

Some team members have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please search for Ampfluence (#1 Instagram Growth Service) and reach out via email or our social media accounts.



Qualified candidates will be invited to a video interview.



We are actively hiring and plan to onboard at least 3 analysts as soon as possible.



Apply only if you are serious about becoming a long-term, high-performing member of our team.

title: Guest Experience & Recruitment Assistant
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a proactive and adaptable Guest Experience & Operations Assistant to support our growing hostel and apartment business. This role sits at the heart of our guest communication and volunteer coordination, while also evolving into a broader virtual assistant position supporting the founders and management team.



If you enjoy hospitality, communication, and working in a fast-moving environment where systems and AI are continuously improving, this role offers plenty of room to grow.



Key Responsibilities

1. Volunteer Recruitment & Coordination

Manage end-to-end volunteer recruitment (posting roles, screening, onboarding)

Communicate with applicants and maintain a strong pipeline of candidates

Coordinate schedules and ensure smooth onboarding experiences

2. Guest Messaging & Experience

Respond to guest inquiries across booking platforms and direct channels

Ensure fast, friendly, and helpful communication at all stages (pre-arrival, during stay, post-stay)

Handle common issues and escalate when needed

Maintain a high standard of tone and response quality

3. Operations & Virtual Assistant Support

Assist founders and managers with day-to-day administrative tasks

Support operational improvements and documentation

Help implement and manage systems (including AI tools for guest messaging)

Take on ad hoc tasks as the business evolves

How the Role Will Evolve



We are actively integrating AI into guest communications. Over time:



Repetitive messaging tasks will decrease

Your role will shift toward oversight, optimization, and higher-level support

You’ll play a key role in improving systems and workflows

What We’re Looking For

Strong written English (friendly, clear, and professional tone)

Excellent organization and responsiveness

Ability to multitask and manage ongoing conversations

Comfortable working remotely and independently

Interest in hospitality, travel, or guest experience

Tech-savvy and open to learning new tools (including AI systems)

Nice to Have

Experience in hospitality, hostels, or short-term rentals

Experience with platforms like Airbnb, 
, or similar

Opportunity to grow into a broader operations role

Please send:



A short introduction about yourself

Relevant experience

An example of a guest message you would send to a traveler asking about availability

title: Construction Administrative & Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly dedicated, detail-oriented, and reliable Virtual Assistant to serve as the operational backbone for a construction professional. This is a full-time position for someone who thrives on precision and understands that the success of a construction project depends on the accuracy of the "back-office" operations.

You will be responsible for managing the data, finances, and logistics that keep our job sites moving forward. The ideal candidate is a "numbers person" with a no-error mindset when it comes to bookkeeping, estimating, and procurement. We are looking for a long-term partner who will take ownership of these systems and ensure flawless execution.

This is a full-time commitment of 160 hours per month (40 hours per week).

Preferred Working Hours

The assistant must be available to work daily during standard business hours: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Core Responsibilities

1. Data Management & Financial Bookkeeping

Maintain the financial health of all active projects through meticulous record-keeping.

Bookkeeping: Manage daily financial entries, reconcile accounts, and ensure all business expenses are categorized correctly for tax and project-tracking purposes.

Spreadsheet Management: Expertly maintain and update complex project data within Excel and Google Sheets to track budgets, labor costs, and project timelines.

Invoice Verification: Review and double-check all subcontractor and vendor invoices for accuracy against quoted prices and work completed.

2. Estimating & Procurement Logistics

Support the bidding process and the supply chain to ensure project profitability and site efficiency.

Estimation Support: Assist in preparing project estimates by pulling current market costs, calculating material quantities, and organizing data into professional bid documents.

Ordering & Tracking: Manage the end-to-end process of ordering construction materials and furnishings. You will track orders, confirm delivery dates, and proactively resolve any backorder or shipping issues.

Vendor Relations: Maintain a database of suppliers and subcontractors, ensuring pricing remains competitive and insurance certificates/contracts are up to date.

3. Executive Administrative & Operations Support

Ensure day-to-day business operations are streamlined, organized, and professional.

Project Documentation: Accurately input and organize project notes, client information, site photos, and daily reports into our internal management systems.

Communication Management: Manage and organize business communications, including
s and scheduling site visits or inspections.

Process Improvement: Identify opportunities to streamline administrative workflows to avoid costly mistakes and improve turnaround times.

Qualifications and Candidate Profile

We are looking for a high-level professional who possesses a high degree of dedication and "ownership" over their work.

Technical Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Excel and Google Sheets (you should be comfortable with formulas, linking sheets, and high-level data organization).

Bookkeeping Experience: Proven track record in basic accounting principles and bookkeeping software (e.g., QuickBooks or Xero).

Meticulous Attention to Detail: Exceptional focus when managing invoices, pricing, and ordering logistics to ensure zero-error output.

Construction Literacy: Previous experience in the construction or trade industry is highly preferred. You should understand (or be eager to learn) construction terminology and material types.

Critical Thinking: Demonstrated ability to think proactively, solve logistical problems independently, and flag potential budget overruns before they happen.

How to Apply

If you are a dedicated professional with a strong administrative and bookkeeping background, please submit your resume and a brief introduction highlighting your experience with Excel, construction logistics, and financial tracking to:

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
The Birdhouse Records

Content Creator (Short-Form / Music / House)

Remote · Part-time (?10 hrs/week)



About Birdhouse:

Birdhouse Records is an independent house music label focused on disco, funky, and groove-driven music.

We’re building artists, not just releasing tracks.

That means content isn’t filler, it’s how the music spreads.



The Role:



This is not a posting role.

This is not just video editing.



You are responsible for:

Finding what works

Turning that into ideas

Executing those ideas into content

You will not be filming yourself.



You will be working with:

DJ footage

Artist-submitted clips

Existing online media

Raw assets we provide



Your job is to turn that into content people actually watch.



Responsibilities:



1. Research (this is a big part of the job)

Study artists, labels, and music accounts that are growing

Identify specific posts that are performing well

Break down why they work (hook, format, pacing)

Bring back ideas we can replicate or adapt



2. Concept Development

Turn tracks, moments, or artist stories into content ideas

Create clear concepts before editing (not just “cut clips together”)

Suggest what footage we need from artists when necessary



3. Editing & Execution

Create short-form videos (10–90 seconds)

Use hooks, captions, pacing, and structure that drive retention

Edit using tools like CapCut, Premiere, etc. (nothing overly complex)



4. Content Output

Focus on Instagram first (Reels), with reuse for TikTok/Shorts

Aim for consistent, repeatable formats and not random one-offs

Prioritize engagement and watch time over “polished” visuals



5. Optimization

Pay attention to what performs

Double down on winning formats

Iterate quickly



What We’re Looking For:

You understand house / EDM culture (required)

You’ve created or managed content that gets consistent engagement

Doesn’t need to be viral

But should show ~1k+ views per post consistently

You know what makes someone stop scrolling

You can think in formats and hooks, not just edits

You are proactive and don’t need constant direction

You speak fluent english (accent is okay)



What We Don’t Need:

Someone who only edits clips we hand them

Someone who waits to be told exactly what to do

Someone focused on “cinematic” or overly polished content



If that’s you, this won’t be a fit.



Bonus (Not Required):

Experience working with artists or music brands

Basic understanding of music promotion

DJ/producer background



What Success Looks Like:

Consistent content output every week 

Repeatable content formats that perform

Regular posts hitting 1k–5k+ views, with some scaling higher

Clear improvement over time based on iteration



What You Get:

Direct access to artists and releases

Creative ownership (we expect ideas, not just execution)

Flexible, remote work

Opportunity to grow with the label



How to Apply:



Send:

2–5 examples of content you’ve created

Links to any accounts you’ve managed (if applicable)

A short note on why you’re a fit

Optional (recommended):

2–3 content ideas for a house music release

title: Video Editor (DTC eCommerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply :

title: Proposal Grant Writer and Research Specialist
description:
Grant Writer  Request For Proposal (RFP) Writing Specialist 



The Kirkland Group

About Us:

The Kirkland Group is a leading provider of teacher coaching and professional development services for school districts across the United States. We are committed to helping educators achieve excellence in their roles, and we are expanding our team to better respond to government Request for Proposals (RFPs) in the education sector.

Job Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Virtual Assistant with expertise in writing and responding to government Request for Proposals (RFPs). The ideal candidate will work remotely to assist in researching RFP opportunities daily and crafting well-written, competitive proposals tailored to the requirements of school districts.

Responsibilities:

Search for daily RFP opportunities on platforms such as RFP School Watch.

Review and analyze RFP documents to understand the requirements and specifications.

Qualifications:

Proven experience in writing and responding to government RFPs (preferably in the education sector).

Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

Strong organizational and time management skills.

Attention to detail and ability to analyze complex documents.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and PDF tools (e.g., Adobe Acrobat).

Ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines.

Experience with U.S.-based RFPs is a strong advantage.

Preferred Qualifications:

Familiarity with educational programs, professional development, or coaching services.

Knowledge of RFP platforms like RFP School Watch or similar.

Bachelor’s degree in a related field (e.g., English, Business, Communications).

Work Hours:

This is a full-time remote position. The candidate must be available during U.S. business hours to collaborate with our team when needed.

How to Apply:

Submit your introduction video, resume, and cover letter to 
 samples of past RFPs or proposals you have worked on, if available.

title: Long-Form YouTube Editor for Basketball/Lifestyle Creator

title: TECHNICAL BUILDER — AI & FULL-STACK DEVELOPMENT
description:
TECHNICAL BUILDER — AI & FULL-STACK DEVELOPMENT

AI-Powered Ultra-Luxury Real Estate Intelligence Platform



ENGAGEMENT: Project-based contract, ongoing per phase

HOURS: 20–40 hrs/week, scaling with project phases

START: Immediate — Phase 1 ready to begin



---



THE OPPORTUNITY



We are building a sophisticated tech stack that combines:



- Real-time NYC public records ingestion (ACRIS deed transfers, DOB permits)

- AI agents that score ownership velocity and buyer intent

- A GoHighLevel CRM layer for relationship and deal tracking

- Automated outreach, scheduling, and document workflows

- A Next.js intelligence dashboard for the operator (Phase 4)



The platform is architected and the build plan is fully documented across 30 days of structured phases. You are not designing this — you are executing it under the direction of the COO, who leads strategy and approves all outputs.



---



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD



Phase 1 (Days 1–8) — Data Foundation

Supabase Postgres schema, ACRIS/DOB ingestion scripts, nightly cron jobs, data validation



Phase 2 (Days 9–17) — Intelligence Layer

Claude API agents, prompt engineering, structured JSON outputs, ownership velocity scoring, buyer intent scoring



Phase 3 (Days 18–24) — Automation

Zapier workflows, GHL CRM integration, Resend
 sequences, 
 scheduling, error monitoring



Phase 4 (Days 25–30) — Frontend

Next.js dashboard on Vercel, intelligence dashboard, property profiles, Supabase Auth, brief generator UI



---



TECH STACK — YOU MUST KNOW THESE TOOLS



Non-negotiable. Do not apply if you cannot demonstrate hands-on experience with the majority of these:



- Supabase (Postgres) — schema design, SQL queries, Edge Functions, pg_cron, upsert patterns

- Claude API / Anthropic SDK — prompt engineering, structured JSON outputs, multi-step agent design

- Claude Code — AI-assisted development tool (daily workflow)

- Claude Cowork — collaborative AI desktop automation tool

- GoHighLevel (GHL) — CRM workflows, pipeline stages, API integration, contact note writes, document/contract workflows and NDA automation

- Zapier — multi-step zaps, webhook triggers, Supabase to GHL bridging

- Next.js + Tailwind CSS — frontend scaffolding, Vercel 

- Resend — transactional
 API

- Twilio — SMS automation

- 
 — embedded scheduling and webhook triggers



Nice to have (not required):

- Perplexity API integration

- Clay data enrichment workflows



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This is not a junior gig. We need someone who:



- Thinks in systems — you connect data flows, not just write individual scripts

- Is AI-native — you use Claude Code and AI assistance as your PRIMARY development method, not a fallback

- Writes clean, documented code that a non-developer can follow and verify

- Communicates clearly in written English — you will submit daily async updates

- Executes independently under direction — you don't wait to be micromanaged, but you don't freelance on architecture either

- Has shipped real projects — portfolio or GitHub required; we will look at actual work

- Is comfortable with ambiguity — not everything will be perfectly documented; you ask smart questions



---



WHAT THIS IS NOT



Read this carefully before applying:



- This is NOT a design role — the architecture is set, you are executing it

- This is NOT a listing website or standard real estate tech — it is a proprietary intelligence operation

- This is NOT a solo gig — you report to the COO who approves all builds before they advance

- This is NOT entry-level — if you are learning Supabase or the Claude API for the first time, this is not the right project



---



HOW WE WORK



- Async-first — you are not expected to work US hours, but overlap for daily check-ins is a plus

- Daily update: short written summary of what was completed, what is next, any blockers

- Phase-by-phase delivery — each phase has defined outputs and sign-off before the next begins

- All code in GitHub, all credentials managed via .env files — never hardcoded

- NDA and IP assignment agreement required before access to any platform credentials or data



---



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY



Applications without the following will not be read:



1. Subject line must include: BROW-BUILD-2026 — anything else goes to trash

2. One paragraph: what you have actually built with Supabase and the Claude API (not what you can do — what you HAVE done)

3. Link to GitHub profile or a project you have shipped

4. Your honest assessment of which phase of this build you are strongest in



---

title: Backend Operations Manager
description:
Hello Future Employee,



Who are we?



We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating Shopify brand stores across the USA and beyond, generating consistent 6-figure monthly revenue. We specialize in emotionally-driven direct response advertising.



We are hiring a **Backend Manager** to bring structure, systems, and accountability to our backend operations. The right candidate is a builder — someone who walks into a fast-moving operation, identifies what's broken or unorganized, and installs the SOPs, dashboards, and processes that make the machine run. You will report directly to the co-founder and be the main point of contact for backend operations across the business.



**Responsibilities:**



- Build out systems and SOPs across backend departments (the operation isn't very organized right now — this is your starting point)

- Own KPI tracking and accountability for each backend department: Disputes, Customer Service, and Supply Chain

- Hire and onboard tea
mbers for those departments (with co-founder support in the beginning)

- Identify bottlenecks, design the fix, document the process, and train the team on it

- Manage performance: make sure each department actually hits the KPIs you set



**You are the perfect fit if you have these qualities:**



- Demonstrable experience building workflows or systems from scratch in an e-commerce or operational environment — you can show us specific examples of processes you've designed and rolled out

- Hands-on familiarity with Shopify backend operations (orders, fulfillment, refunds, disputes, customer service workflows)

- A strong operator mindset: you see chaos and your instinct is to map it, document it, and systematize it

- Comfortable hiring, training, and holding tea
mbers accountable to KPIs

- Self-directed — you take a goal and run with it, you don't wait for step-by-step instructions

- Strong written communication for SOPs, briefs, and team comms



**You are NOT the right fit if:**



- You have no real, demonstrable experience building systems or SOPs. This is not an entry-level role for someone curious about operations — we need someone who has already done this work.

- Your background is primarily in customer service, virtual assistance, or data entry and you're hoping to "transition" into management. We are not the company to learn on. You should already be operating at a manager level.

- You have never worked with Shopify or in e-commerce backend operations. If you don't know what a chargeback dispute lifecycle looks like or how a CS team should be structured, this role will not work for you.

- You need detailed step-by-step instructions for every task. We move fast and expect you to take a brief and run with it.

- You apply with a generic copy-paste cover letter and no examples of your work. Applications without examples of prior systems or workflows you've built will not be reviewed.



**To apply, please include:**



- 2–3 examples of prior workflows, SOPs, or systems you've personally built (screenshots, Loom walkthroughs, Notion links, or written descriptions are all fine)

- A short note on the team size you've managed and the KPIs you owned

- Your experience with Shopify and any e-commerce backend tools (Gorgias, Reamaze, ClickUp, dispute platforms, etc.)

- Include **"COF"** at the top of your application to confirm you've read the full post



**What we offer:**



- 100% remote work setup

- Starting rate of **$5/hour** with performance-based growth opportunities

- Direct mentorship from the co-founder

- Real ownership over backend operations from day one

- Long-term growth potential as the team scales



If you are an operator at heart, thrive on bringing order to chaos, and want to own a backend from the ground up, we'd love to hear from you.



Best Regards,

Heritage And Hearth LLC

title: ALL-ROUNDER VIRTUAL ASSISTANT (HIGH PERFORMANCE ROLE)
description:

/SMS, ads) and execute fast.



This is not a beginner role and not a slow-paced job. You’ll be working inside a team that moves quickly, handles multiple clients, and expects things to get done properly the first time.



What this role actually looks like



You’ll be handling a mix of:



Ecommerce tasks (store updates, product uploads, backend work)

Admin + operational work

Supporting different tea
mbers across multiple clients

Cleaning up messy systems and organizing them properly



Some days are structured. Some aren’t. You need to be comfortable figuring things out.



What we’re looking for

Fluent English (clear communication is a must)

Fast response time during working hours (a few minutes, not hours)

Strong problem-solving ability (you try first, then ask)

Organized and detail-oriented

Able to handle multiple things at once without getting overwhelmed

iPhone, fast WiFi, and a solid laptop (MacBook preferred)

Tools we use (experience here is a big plus)

Shopify

Notion

Slack

Google Drive



Bonus:



Omnisend

Postscript

Fast-paced environment — things don’t sit for hours

No micromanaging, but high expectations

If something is assigned, it’s owned until fully done



There may be occasional weekend work during important 
nts (launches, urgent tasks), so flexibility matters.



Compensation & growth

Full-time: 40 hours/week



This is an entry point, not a ceiling.



If you prove you can:



move fast

think independently

execute cleanly



your pay will increase within 1–2 months.



We’re looking for someone long-term who can grow with the team, not someone just looking for a temporary task job.



What matters most

You take ownership (we don’t chase people)

You communicate clearly (no vague updates)

You don’t disappear when things get busy

You actually care about doing things properly

How to apply



Send:



Your resume / CV

Any past work or proof of experience (anything counts)

A short message:

why you’re a good fit

a time you figured something out without being told



Somewhere in your application, include the word “northstar” so we know you actually read this.



If you don’t include proof of work, you won’t be considered.



TEXT ME ON WHATSAPP FOR FASTER RESPONSE

title: Accountant / Account Coordinator (Client Invoicing & Billing)
description:
Key Responsibilities 

• Customer Invoicing & Billing 

o Prepare and issue accurate invoices based on sales orders, contracts, or project milestones 

o Ensure all billing details (pricing, quantities, taxes, terms) are correct before sending 

o Maintain organized records of all invoices and billing documents 

• Client Communication 

o Act as the main point of contact for customers regarding invoices, payments, and billing inquiries 

o Respond to client questions on charges, discrepancies, and payment terms 

o Follow up on outstanding invoices and coordinate collections 

• Accounts Receivable & Payables Management 

o Monitor aging reports and track payment status 

o Ensure timely collection of payments based on agreed terms 

o Manage and record payables as needed 

• Full-Cycle Accounting 

o Handle end-to-end accounting processes, including journal entries, reconciliations, and ledger management 

o Perform bank and account reconciliations regularly 

o Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records 







• Financial Reporting 

o Generate financial reports for internal teams, including but not limited to: 

? Accounts receivable aging 

? Revenue summaries 

? Cash flow tracking 

o Support management with insights for decision-making 

• Coordination with Internal Teams 

o Work closely with sales and operations to verify order details before invoicing 

o Assist in resolving discrepancies between orders, deliveries, and invoices 

• Process Improvement 

o Identify inefficiencies in billing and accounting processes 

o Help standardize procedures for better accuracy and efficiency

________________________________________

Requirements

• Education & Experience 

o Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or a related field 

o Minimum 2–4 years’ experience in accounting, billing, or accounts receivable 

o Experience handling client-facing financial communication is a strong advantage 

o Experience in full-cycle accounting and financial reporting required

• Technical Skills 

o Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., Xero) 

o Strong knowledge of invoicing, accounts receivable, and basic accounting principles 

o Skilled in Microsoft Excel (data tracking, reconciliation, reporting) 

o Experience preparing reports for management and external accountants

• Communication Skills 

o Strong written and verbal English communication 

o Ability to explain billing details clearly to clients without confusion 

o Professional and firm when handling payment follow-ups 

• Core Competencies 

o High attention to detail and accuracy 

o Strong organizational and time management skills 

o Ability to handle sensitive financial information with confidentiality 

o Problem-solving mindset—can handle discrepancies and disputes effectively 

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications 

• Experience in B2B environments (handling bulk orders, payment terms, etc.) 

• Familiarity with international transactions, currencies, and tax handling 

• Experience coordinating with logistics or order fulfillment teams 

________________________________________

Working Style Expectations

• Proactive in following up on payments—doesn’t want to be told 

• Takes ownership of billing accuracy from start to finish 

• Maintains professionalism when dealing with clients, even in payment disputes 

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, transaction-heavy environment

title: Project Manager (Remote - Contract Role 12 Months)
description:

You’ll work closely with leadership and different departments to keep projects on track, solve problems, and deliver results.

title: Social Media Meta Advertising Specialist
description:
Job Title: Full-time Social Media, Content & Meta Advertising Specialist



We need an exceptional Social Media, Content and Meta Advertising Specialist with fluent English, strong commercial understanding, and proven hands-on experience producing content and campaigns that generate real enquiries and measurable return on investment.



We are a UK based 
 well-established Company in the luxury end of the home-improvement market, primarily across the South of England with some wider UK coverage. We design and market premium conservatories, orangeries, glass extensions, refurbishment services and related specialist products.

We are looking to appoint a full-time remote contractor, working from your own home in the Philippines, during full UK working hours. This role is not just about posting nice-looking content. We need somebody who understands how to build trust before the sale, how to attract the right audiences, and how to make Meta advertising produce genuine leads rather than vanity metrics.



Do you understand how to produce social media content for
, Instagram and YouTube that fits a premium brand? Can you write or help produce high-quality blogs that meet modern SEO and AI-search requirements? Do you know how to build, test and improve Meta campaigns, remarketing audiences, lookalike audiences, browser pixel tracking, Conversion API connections and lead funnels that improve cost per lead and lead quality over time?

If you are commercially minded, data-aware, organised, and able to show real examples of past campaign performance and content results, we would like to hear from you.



Consultant Scope of Work (Job Description)

The Company; – We are a UK based 
 well-established Company in the luxury goods top-end home improvement market primarily in the South of England but with some UK wide coverage. We are looking to appoint a full-time Social Media, Content and Meta Advertising Specialist consultant, working from your own home in the Philippines. You must have a proven successful track record, previous Business-to-Consumer marketing experience, excellent written English, and the ability to work to a high standard with minimal supervision.

Hours; – 8 Hour days – UK time – 7.30am to 4.30pm (one hour lunch break at 12.30pm).

Working days; – 5-day working week – Monday to Friday. Total of 40 hours each week. Good flexibility with adequate notice to adjust working days to suit business needs, but payment is only for the agreed working time.

IT systems set-up; – Must have good reliable electricity supply and internet connection with a good quality reliable PC or laptop. Familiar with Microsoft 365 Office suite, cloud-based marketing tools, Meta Business Suite / Ads Manager, and AI-assisted content tools such as ChatGPT.



Daily communication; – Constant daily contact via Teams video link,
, WhatsApp and telephone, with Timeproof tracking if required. At the end of each day send a daily
 with a specific summary of works completed, campaign progress, results, and any problems encountered.



Pay and payment process; – Salary to be finalised depending on experience and proven results in the region of $4 to $6 per hour. Paid monthly on the last business day of each month in US Dollars via Wise / EasyPay / PayPal. Invoice required for payment. Any transaction or currency fees remain at consultant’s cost. Consultant provides their own equipment, internet connection, and software subscriptions including paid for version of ChatGPT. Excellent dedicated work that demonstrates exceptional performance may also attract a discretionary performance bonus and, after successfully completing the first 12 months, an additional 13th month bonus may be considered.



Description of scope of works; – To build and manage a stronger trust-based digital marketing system, with particular focus on social media content, blog content and profitable Meta advertising that clearly demonstrates a return on investment.



Main Responsibilities

• Plan, create, schedule and improve organic social media content primarily for
 and Instagram, with selected repurposed content for YouTube.

• Write, draft or assist in producing blogs for Room Outside that are aligned to current SEO good practice, AI-search visibility, customer intent and trust-building principles.

• Maintain brand tone suitable for a premium, aspirational home-improvement business and ensure content feels polished, commercially aware and consistent with 
.

• Create, manage and optimise Meta advertising campaigns with a clear focus on lead quality, cost efficiency and return on investment, not just impressions or clicks.

• Build and improve remarketing campaigns, audience segmentation, lookalike audiences, creative testing, landing page alignment and follow-up journey logic.

• Understand Meta Pixel, browser-based event tracking, Conversion API and related attribution issues sufficiently to help ensure campaign data is as accurate and useful as possible.

• Work with existing website and CRM assets so campaigns, forms and landing pages connect properly and support the customer journey.

• Report weekly on campaign performance, lead quality, creative tests, audience tests, spend levels and recommended next actions.

• Monitor competitor activity, content trends and platform changes where relevant, then suggest practical ideas that could improve results for Room Outside.

• Carry out other reasonable marketing support tasks related to content production, audience development, remarketing, blog optimisation and lead-generation support.



Must-Have Experience

• Strong written English and confidence writing clear, natural marketing copy.

• Hands-on Meta /
 advertising experience with evidence of campaign setup, optimisation and reporting.

• Experience creating social media content for Business-to-Consumer brands.

• Good understanding of how content, adverts and landing pages work together to build trust and generate enquiries.

• Experience with remarketing, audience targeting, lead funnels and campaign testing.

• Comfortable using AI tools productively without producing lazy or generic content.

• Well organised, reliable, responsive and able to work consistently during UK business hours.



Preferred / Desirable Experience

• Experience in premium home improvement, interiors, architecture, lifestyle or property-related marketing.

• Working knowledge of WordPress, basic page editing and on-page SEO principles.

• Experience with YouTube content repurposing, captions, shorts or channel support.

• Experience interpreting CRM lead data and feeding this back into campaign decisions.

• Understanding of customer psychology in higher-ticket purchases where trust and reassurance matter more than impulse clicks.



Home Working Environment

As a homeworker the contractor will be expected to have a dedicated suitably quiet area that is conducive to working without interruptions, with their own desk and suitable storage space, suitable to carry out the work required by the Company including uninterrupted telephone and virtual meetings with a good quality broadband signal and good quality reliable PC or laptop, all to be provided free of charge by the contractor.



What Happens Next

It is vital that we select the correct person for this important role as our exciting business plans require a dedicated above-average worker who can perform to a high standard with honesty, consistency and commercial awareness. When you respond to this advert, make sure you tell us which recent marketing campaign or piece of content you are most proud of and, in a few sentences, why.

title: Email & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist (Growth Role) | SaaS + Fitness
description:
We’re building a high-performance outbound engine across multiple SaaS and service brands, and we’re looking for someone to grow into a key part of it.



This is not a basic VA role.



You will work directly with the founder to help build targeted lists, launch campaigns, and create outreach that drives real conversations and leads.



If you want to grow into a senior growth or outbound role over time, this is a strong opportunity.



What You’ll Be Doing



* Build targeted lead lists using tools like Clay

* Enrich and validate prospect data

* Set up and manage
 campaigns in Lemlist or similar tools

* Support LinkedIn outreach (connection messages and follow-ups)

* Write engaging, natural
 and LinkedIn messages

* Track results and help improve performance

* Experience working with international clients



How You Work



We use AI tools to move faster, not to replace thinking.

What This Role Can Grow Into



This is not just a task-based role.



The right person can grow into:

* Owning outbound campaigns end to end

* Managing strategy and performance

* Becoming a senior growth operator



Compensation

$650 to $1,000 USD per month, depending on experience and capability.



We are open to higher compensation for exceptional candidates who can demonstrate strong results.



Role Details



* Full-time role

* Australian business hours

* Long-term opportunity

* Work directly with the founder



How to Apply



We only review applications that follow these steps.



Step 1

Start your application with the word: OUTBOUND



Step 2

Answer this question:

If you were launching an outbound campaign for a fitness software that helps gyms improve member retention, collect valuable lead and membership data who would you target and why?



Step 3

Choose one:

* FitForms

* FitLeads 



Then provide:



Your target audience

A simple list-building approach

A 4
 sequence outline

Write 1 full

title: GOOGLE Media Buyer
description:
We're looking for a talented, solution-oriented Google Media Buyer to join our eCommerce and dropshipping team on a part-time basis. The right candidate has solid experience managing Google Ads accounts for online brands and can demonstrate their skills through previous results. You should be comfortable across campaign types — Search, Shopping, and Performance Max — and have the mindset to find creative solutions fast when performance needs adjustment.



Key Responsibilities:



- Build, manage, and optimize Google Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and Display campaigns for eCommerce brands

- Conduct keyword research, structure ad groups, and write compelling ad copy that converts

- Manage product feeds and optimize titles, descriptions, and attributes for Google Shopping

- Monitor and adjust bids, budgets, and targeting daily to consistently hit ROAS and revenue targets

- Run structured A/B tests on ad copy, landing pages, and bidding strategies

- Analyze search term reports, build negative keyword lists, and review auction insights regularly

- Collaborate with the creative team on display and YouTube ad assets

- Research and stay current on Google Ads updates, new campaign types, and algorithm changes

- Ensure campaign structure, naming conventions, and account hygiene are properly maintained

- Meet deadlines consistently while maintaining attention to quality and detail



Requirements:



- Proven track record managing Google Ads ideally for eCommerce and dropshipping brands — minimum $20k/month in ad spend

- Portfolio or case studies with examples of past accounts and results achieved (ROAS, revenue, CPA)

- Deep knowledge of Smart Bidding, audience layering, and product feed optimization

- Experience with Google Merchant Center and product feed management — please list the tools you use (e.g. DataFeedWatch, Channable, or similar)

- Strong understanding of attribution models and conversion tracking (GA4, enhanced conversions)

- Ability to interpret search query data and build tight negative keyword strategies

- Familiarity with Shopify and common eCommerce KPIs (AOV, LTV, CAC)

- Ability to take performance feedback and adapt strategy accordingly

- Solution-oriented mindset — if there's a performance problem, you find a way to fix it

- Fast learner who can quickly adapt to new brands, products, and market conditions

- Reliable internet connection and strong communication skills



???? How We Work:



1. Start with a small paid test project to check for fit

2. Part-time role with potential to increase hours based on project needs

3. 100% remote, async-friendly — timezone flexible (Europe/Dubai preferred, not required)



?? Please Send:



- Short intro with relevant experience

- 2–3 case studies with monthly spend, ROAS achieved, and campaign types used

- Brief description of your approach to structuring a new eCommerce Google Ads account from scratch

- Tools and dashboards you rely on for reporting, optimization, and feed management

- Your weekly capacity and rate (hourly or monthly retainer)

- Your current availability (hours and timezone)

- Include the word "OptiMax" in your message so we know you read this

title: Technical Project Manager
description:
This role is responsible for leading and managing ERP-related projects end-to-end—from planning and assessment to execution and reporting. The focus is on ensuring that ERP implementations or improvements (e.g., NetSuite, SAP, Oracle ERP, Microsoft Dynamics, Acumatica, Odoo) are delivered efficiently, on time, and aligned with business needs.



Project Planning

- Create detailed project plans and timelines

- Build and manage Gantt charts

- Define project phases, deliverables, and milestones

- Map dependencies across tasks and teams



System & Process Assessment

- Analyze existing workflows, tools, and ERP systems

- Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and gaps

- Recommend improvements or system optimizations



Execution Management

- Oversee day-to-day project execution

- Track milestones and deliverables

- Coordinate with stakeholders (internal teams, vendors, leadership)

- Lead project meetings and ensure accountability



Reporting & Monitoring

- Prepare regular status reports for stakeholders

- Track risks, blockers, and issues

- Adjust timelines and plans when needed

- Provide visibility on progress and performance



Must-Have

- Strong Project Management experience (end-to-end)

- Hands-on experience with at least one ERP system (e.g., NetSuite, SAP, etc.)

- Experience in: Project planning tools (Gantt charts, timelines), Process mapping & improvement, Stakeholder management, Risk tracking



Nice-to-Have

- ERP implementation or migration experience

- Technical understanding of business systems

- Experience working cross-functionally (finance, operations, IT)

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. mbers to ensure tasks are completed on time

 (Meta Ads) platforms
