title: B2B Appointment Setter, Cold Caller
description:
Alta Dev Studio builds custom software and automation tools for manufacturers and distributors in the US Midwest. We're a small, technical team and we're growing our outbound sales operation.



We are hiring a part-time cold caller to reach out to potential customers, qualify whether they have a problem Alta Dev Studio can solve, and book a 15-minute call with one of our partners. 

The people you'll be calling are operations managers, controllers, and IT directors at manufacturing companies with 50–500 employees. They're busy, they get a lot of calls, and most of them will tell you no. 

We'll give you the scripts, the lists, the tools, and the training. 

You bring the work ethic and the ability to sound credible on a cold call with a US business executive.

This position begins part-time and may progress to full-time. 



What you'll be doing



A minimum of 50 outbound dials per day to US manufacturing and distribution companies, this requirement will be adjusted based on outcomes and may increase. 

Navigate gatekeepers and reach decision-makers directly.

Run a short qualifying conversation using our provided scripts.

Book 15-minute phone appointments for our partners.

Log every call accurately in our CRM.

Send follow-up voi
s.

Check-in calls with your manager at least weekly.

We are expecting 1-2 qualified appointments per month.



What we provide

Call scripts, gatekeeper guides, and objection handling playbooks

Prospect lists.

All tools: dialer, CRM,
 system.

Live training before your first dial

Weekly coaching from recorded call reviews



Compensation

Base: $5.50–$6.00/hour USD (~$440–$480/month at 20 hrs/week)

Bonus: $25 per shown appointment

Candidates with significant experience may be eligible for more pay.



Schedule

Part-time, Monday–Friday, 20 hours/week

US Central Time business hours — exact window flexible within 8:00 AM–5:00 PM CT

Overnight shift for Philippines-based applicants



Who we're looking for

Minimum 1 year of B2B cold calling into US businesses, not B2C, not inbound, not customer service

Neutral or near-neutral English accent, clear and confident at cold call pace

Consistent when the calls are hard, tone doesn't change after a string of rejections

Accurate CRM logging, we record calls and cross-reference activity logs

Quiet calling environment, reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps)

Experience calling manufacturing, industrial, or operations contacts is a strong advantage.

Experience working for a software company is an advantage.

title: Online Fitness Accountability Coach & Motivator
description:
JOB TITLE: Online Fitness Accountability Coach & Motivator





HOURS: Part-time / flexible — daily check-ins required

COMMUNICATION: WhatsApp (daily) + Video calls (weekly)



---

ABOUT ME



I'm Aaron, a 39 year old guy from the UK with a good understanding of fitness and nutrition - I've trained before, I know how it works, I've just fallen out of routine and need someone to pull me back on track.



My life is full and busy in the best way: I run my own company, I have a wife, four kids, and two dogs at home. Life doesn't slow down, which is exactly why I've struggled to stay consistent on my own. I'm not looking for someone to teach me the basics. I'm looking for someone who will show up for me every single day and make sure I show up for myself.



My goals are straightforward: lose weight, rebuild my fitness levels, and build a healthier lifestyle that actually fits around real life. I'm self-aware, I know what I need to do, and I'm ready to commit — I just need the right person in my corner to keep me honest and motivated.



This is a great role for the right person. I'm an easy client: I won't ghost you, I won't argue with the plan, and I'll genuinely appreciate the support. I want this to feel like a real working relationship, not a transaction.



ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm looking for an enthusiastic, warm, and highly motivated fitness coach to be my personal accountability partner. This is not a traditional coaching role — I have a good understanding of training and nutrition and will be involved in building my own plan. What I need is someone in my corner every single day: pushing me, checking in, celebrating wins, and picking me up when I slip.



If you are naturally energetic, love motivating people, and genuinely care about helping someone hit their goals — this role is for you.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Send a daily WhatsApp check-in voice and/or text messages — morning motivation, evening progress check (not AI generated)

• Help collaboratively write and refine my workout and nutrition plan

• Record short demonstration videos of exercises so I have a clear reference to follow for each movement

• Review videos I send of myself training and give feedback on my form and posture to make sure I'm performing exercises safely and correctly

• Track my weekly progress (weight, workouts completed, diet adherence) and keep a simple log

• Jump on a weekly video call to review the week, adjust the plan, and set goals for the week ahead

• Celebrate wins but also give honest, supportive feedback when I've had a bad day or gone off track

• Keep communication upbeat, positive, and personal

- Weekly progress photo comparison, food review and review goals regularly



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



? Genuinely warm, personable, and motivating

? Background in fitness, health coaching, nutrition, or personal training

? Excellent written and spoken English

? Reliable and consistent daily check-ins are non-negotiable

? Comfortable on video calls for progress on weigh ins and measurements

? Experience with tracking tools (even a simple spreadsheet is fine)

? Someone who takes ownership and doesn't need to be chased



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



? Writing generic plans or just plainly using AI

? Responding only when I message first

? Copy-paste motivation quotes with no personal touch





TO APPLY



Please send a short voice note or video introducing yourself and telling me why you'd be great at keeping someone motivated and accountable. Added written info on top is fine.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a highly organized and dependable Executive Assistant to support leadership with daily coordination, communication, and backend operations.



This role is not just about assisting. It is about keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes.



You will be responsible for maintaining structure across schedules, tasks, and internal processes while supporting leadership in staying focused on high-value work.



This is ideal for someone who:



* Takes ownership

* Works well within systems

* Values consistency and clarity

* Is looking for long-term growth



---



What You’ll Be Doing



Executive and Admin Support



* Managing calendars, meetings, inboxes, and follow-ups

* Ensuring leadership stays organized and on schedule

* Coordinating internal and external communication



Operations and Process Support



* Creating and maintaining SOPs, checklists, and workflows

* Keeping tasks updated and aligned across the team

* Supporting day-to-day operational coordination



HR and Onboarding Support



* Assisting with new hire onboarding including forms, setup, and documentation

* Maintaining organized employee records and files



Reporting and Documentation



* Preparing reports, summaries, and internal documents

* Using Google Workspace for presentations, trackers, and files



Bookkeeping Support



* Tracking expenses and basic financial data

* Assisting with simple reports and record organization

* Supporting bookkeeping processes as needed



---



Requirements (Important)



Please apply only if you meet most of the following:



* At least 1 year experience as an Executive Assistant

* At least 1 year experience in a BPO environment

* Basic bookkeeping skills such as expense tracking and simple reports

* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong attention to detail and time management

* Able to work independently with minimal supervision

* Comfortable using:



  * Google Workspace such as Docs, Sheets, and Calendar

  * Microsoft Office Suite

  * Project management tools such as ClickUp, Notion, or similar

* Able to write clear SOPs, instructions, and internal documentation



Nice to Have (Not Required)



* Canva for basic designs or presentations

* Experience supporting remote or international teams

* Familiarity with CRM or task management systems



Who This Role Is For



You are:



* Reliable and consistent in your work

* Proactive and do not wait to be told what to do

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Comfortable following up and keeping people accountable

* Calm under pressure and able to manage multiple priorities

* Looking for a long-term role, not a short-term job



You have a “see it, fix it” mindset and take pride in keeping things running properly.



What We Offer



* Competitive salary based on experience

* Consistent work hours

* Long-term stability and growth

* Structured systems and clear expectations

* Performance-based increases and opportunities



Before You Apply



Please complete this application form before proceeding:





Once you have submitted the form, please send a confirmation message here on OnlineJobs.ph.

Only applicants who complete both steps will be considered.

description:

The only thing I care about is the result, not how much time it takes. If you can do it fast, great.



Pay: $70 USD per video + additional $30/video bonus if it passes 2,000 views in it's first week of posting.



Turnaround: 2-3 days



What You’ll Be Editing:



I will provide (1) Raw recorded video and (2) the script I used. Your job is to turn it into an engaging finished video.



Responsibilities:

- Clean up audio and video so it follows the script

- Remove mistakes, pauses, filler words, dead space, etc.

- Tighten pacing for retention

- Add zoom ins / zoom outs where helpful

- Add relevant b-roll, clips, 
s, movie scenes, reaction 
nts, or visuals when appropriate

- Keep the video dynamic and engaging throughout

- Add English captions (I will give you the script)

- Deliver final polished video ready to publish



This is the style of video I'm looking for: 
/watch?v=-fK3OaJ9Mjk



On my last job posting, I received many applicants who provided examples of others' work. I'm now asking for a 2-minute test edit. I'll provide the talking video and the script. If you'd like to apply, send me the word "edit" and I'll send you the test video.

title: 100+ Properties - STR Ops, Claims, Cleaner & Maintenance Coordination
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled and proactive Guest Experience & Operations Virtual Assistant to join our Short-Term Rental (STR) team. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, knows how to stay on top of details, and ensures nothing slips through the cracks.



You’ll be responsible for keeping operations running smoothly—coordinating with cleaners and maintenance, ensuring documentation is complete, managing inventory and restocks, and providing reliable support so guests enjoy seamless stays.



Key Responsibilities

Occasionally take care of guest communications



Coordinate cleaner schedules and follow up to confirm all cleans are completed



Call or message cleaners as needed to ensure timeliness and quality



Review, track, and request proper documentation from cleaners, ensuring all submissions are complete and accurate



Identify and rectify cleaning issues quickly, coordinating re-cleans when necessary



Manage battery changes, troubleshoot small operational issues, and escalate maintenance requests when needed



Coordinate with maintenance teams and track follow-ups to completion



Oversee inventory tracking, restocking, and ordering for supplies and consumables



Keep all task boards, tickets, and operational documentation updated and accurate



Make independent, sound decisions when issues arise, balancing company policies with guest satisfaction



Requirements



3+ years of experience in short-term rental operations, co-hosting, or a similar VA/operations role



Strong understanding of property management, cleaner coordination, and guest experience



Excellent customer service instincts with proven ability to de-escalate and resolve issues



Exceptional written and verbal communication skills



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in follow-through



Comfortable managing multiple properties and priorities simultaneously



Preferred Tools Experience



Hostaway PMS (or similar tools like Hospitable, Guesty, etc.)



OTAs (Airbnb, Vrbo, 
)



Slack, OpenPhone, Amazon, Ring, Schlage, Turno



Experience with review management, claims handling, and guest follow-up



To Apply



Please start your application with:



Total years of STR experience



Platforms and tools you’ve used



Number of properties you’ve managed or supported



Brief overview of your daily tasks in previous roles



We’re only considering applicants who follow these instructions. If you’re sharp, dependable, and passionate about guest experience and operational excellence, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Sales Development Rep / SDR (Remote — Offshore)
description:
Job Title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) — Healthcare Compliance (Remote)

Company: Access Plus Health

Location: Remote (Philippines or Latin America preferred)

Type: Full-time contractor  |  $1,000–$1,500 /month + performance bonuses

Hours: 40 hours/week  |  Must work during U.S. business hours (Eastern or Pacific time zone)



About Access Plus Health

Access Plus Health is a physician-led compliance company providing medical directorship, collaborative practice agreements, and regulatory compliance services to healthcare businesses across all 50 U.S. states. Founded by a Harvard-trained, board-certified dermatologist, we serve med spas, aesthetics clinics, IV therapy practices, and nurse practitioner-led businesses. We are scaling rapidly and building the sales infrastructure to match our growth.



The Role

We're hiring our first SDR to support the founder (and eventually a dedicated U.S.-based closer) in converting inbound leads into clients. Your job is to make our sales team more efficient by handling everything that isn't the actual selling conversation: qualifying leads, booking discovery calls, managing the CRM, assembling proposals, following up, and keeping the pipeline clean.

You will NOT be cold-calling or doing hard sales. Our leads come in through our website, webinars, referrals, and social media. Your job is to be the organized, responsive, detail-oriented engine that ensures no lead falls through the cracks and every qualified prospect gets on a call.

When you are NOT engaging in these items, your job is to remain proactive.  Be creative, find leads, be hungry. 



What You'll Do

Lead Qualification: Review every inbound lead within 2 hours. Assess fit using our qualification criteria (practice type, state, number of providers, services offered, timeline). Tag and score leads in GoHighLevel. Route qualified leads to the sales calendar.

Appointment Setting: Reach out to qualified leads via
 (using provided templates) to schedule discovery calls. Manage the founder's (and later, closer's) sales calendar. Send confirmation
s, reminders, and prep notes before each call. Reschedule no-shows within 24 hours.

CRM Management: Maintain GoHighLevel pipeline with accurate deal stages, notes, and next steps for every active lead. Update deal values, close dates, and contact information. Generate weekly pipeline reports (total leads, qualified leads, calls booked, calls completed, proposals sent, deals in progress).

Proposal & Document Support: Assemble customized proposals using our templates (fill in client-specific details: state, practice type, number of providers, recommended tier). Prepare compliance assessment memos from discovery call notes. Send proposals to prospects and track open/view status.

Follow-Up: Execute systematic follow-up sequences for leads at every stage — new leads who haven't booked a call, prospects who've had a discovery call but haven't received a proposal, proposals that have been sent but not signed, and past prospects who said 'not now' (quarterly re-engagement). No lead goes more than 48 hours without a next step.

Webinar & Event Follow-Up: After every webinar, contact all registrants within 24 hours. Qualify attendees. Book discovery calls for hot leads. Add warm leads to nurture sequences.

Referral Partner Support: Track referral partner activity. Follow up with referred leads within 24 hours. Report referral conversions monthly.



What We're Looking For

Required: 3+ years of experience in a B2B sales support, SDR, or virtual assistant role (experience working for a U.S.-based company strongly preferred). Excellent written English — your
s need to sound natural and professional to U.S. healthcare professionals. Experience with a CRM platform (GoHighLevel preferred; Salesforce, Pipedrive, or similar accepted). Highly organized and detail-oriented — you manage dozens of leads simultaneously and nothing slips. Fast response time — you treat a new lead like a ticking clock. Comfortable learning a new industry — you don't need to know healthcare compliance today, but you need to learn it quickly and speak about it credibly in
.



Nice to Have: Previous experience in healthcare, compliance, legal, or professional services sales support. Experience with appointment scheduling tools (Calendly, GoHighLevel Meetings). Experience writing or customizing proposals. Familiarity with LinkedIn for professional outreach.



Compensation & Bonuses

$1,000–$1,500 /month base (based on experience). Performance bonuses: $ per qualified discovery call that is booked and attended. Monthly bonus ($200) for hitting lead response time and CRM accuracy targets. 



How to Apply

Send: (1) a brief message explaining your relevant experience in sales support or lead management, (2) a description of the CRM platforms you've used and how you kept pipeline data organized, and (3) complete this test:



 TEST (required — applications without this will not be reviewed):

Pretend you work for Access Plus Health. A med spa owner named Sarah attended our webinar on 'CPOM Compliance for Med Spas' two days ago but hasn't booked a discovery call. You know she runs a 3-location medspa chain in Texas and Florida. Write the follow-up
 to get her on a call (5–8 sentences). Then explain in 2–3 sentences why you wrote it the way you did.

title: Google Ads Specialist for US-Based Digital Marketing Agency
description:
ABOUT US:

IZY Digital is a performance marketing agency built for home service businesses. For over five years, we've helped plumbers, cleaners, movers, and contractors fill their schedules through Google Ads, local SEO, and smart automation—and most of our clients come to us through referrals.

We're official partners with Google, Yelp, Meta, and Bing. Our stack includes GoHighLevel, AgencyAnalytics, WhatConverts, SearchAtlas, and a growing library of AI-powered tools built by our in-house dev team. We're a small, senior team where your work has a direct impact on real businesses.



THE ROLE:

We're looking for a Google Ads specialist who can own campaign performance end to end. You'll manage paid search, display, and local/maps campaigns for a portfolio of home service clients—from strategy and keyword research through to optimization and results.

This is a hands-on-keyboard role. You won't be sitting on client calls or building reports in spreadsheets. Account managers handle client communication, and our reporting tools handle the dashboards. Your job is to make campaigns perform.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Build, launch, and continuously optimize Google Ads campaigns (search, display, local/maps) for home service clients

- Conduct keyword research and competitive analysis to identify high-intent opportunities

- Write compelling ad copy and test variations to improve click-through and conversion rates

- Monitor budgets, bids, and quality scores daily; adjust strategy based on performance data

- Set up and maintain conversion tracking through Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager

- Collaborate with in-house WordPress developers on landing page improvements that support campaign goals

Identify opportunities to scale winning campaigns and flag underperformers early





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Experience: 3+ years managing Google Ads campaigns

- Local focus: Proven results with local or home service verticals

- Analytical mindset: Comfortable digging into data to diagnose issues and spot opportunities

- Tools: Hands-on proficiency with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Google Ads Editor

- Ad copywriting: You can write concise, benefit-driven ad copy that fits character limits and drives action

- Communication: Fluent written and spoken English

- Work style: Self-directed and reliable—you manage your own time and flag blockers before they become problems





NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience with GoHighLevel, AgencyAnalytics, or WhatConverts

- Familiarity with AI tools for ad copy, keyword research, or workflow automation (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Google Ads certification

- Experience managing multi-location or franchise campaigns





WHAT WE OFFER:

- Focus on your craft – Dedicated account managers handle all client communication. No client calls, no manual reporting—AgencyAnalytics and WhatConverts do the heavy lifting.

- Dev support – In-house WordPress developers for landing pages, plus automation engineers who can build custom tools for your workflow.

- Full tools stack – GoHighLevel, AgencyAnalytics, WhatConverts, SearchAtlas, Google Ads Editor, ChatGPT, Claude, Canva, and more.

- Compensation – Biweekly pay with performance-based bonuses. Salary grows as your portfolio grows.

- Flexibility – Flexible schedule with a reliable, async-friendly team.

- Growth – Structured onboarding with mentorship from experienced local marketers. Real advancement opportunities in a stable, growing company.

title: Sales & Client Support Coordinator (Remote – Philippines)
description:
WORK HOURS: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Toronto Time (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

PAY: Php 25,000/month + performance bonuses

JOB TYPE: Full-time, long-term

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines onlyAbsolutely — here’s the same post **formatted specifically for OnlineJobs.ph** so it’s easy to scan, firm, and filters better.

This matches how candidates actually read listings on that platform.





ABOUT US



Snaptique is a Canada-wide photo booth and experiential events company.

We work with weddings, corporate events, and brand activations across multiple cities and provinces in Canada.



This role is often the first human interaction our clients have with Snaptique. How you communicate matters.



---



 ABOUT THE ROLE (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



This is not a task-only Virtual Assistant role.



We are hiring a Sales & Client Support Coordinator who is comfortable:



* taking ownership of client conversations

* following up when clients don’t reply

* discussing pricing and availability

* helping move clients toward a booking decision



If you prefer avoiding follow-ups, pricing conversations, or client pressure, this role is not a good fit.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



* Respond promptly to new client inquiries

* Prepare accurate quotes and explain options clearly

* Follow up with clients who haven’t replied

* Handle questions about pricing and availability with confidence

* Keep leads organized so no inquiry is missed

* Move conversations forward toward booking

* Hand off confirmed bookings smoothly to operations



---



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



* 2+ years of client-facing sales or client support experience

* Previous experience working with Canada- or US-based companies

* Strong spoken and written English

* Comfortable communicating with clients by phone and

* Comfortable following up multiple times when needed

* Organized, proactive, and accountable

* Reliable internet and quiet home workspace

* Available to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Toronto time



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT



* Not a task-only VA role

* Not a “wait for instructions” position

* Not suitable if you’re uncomfortable with follow-ups or pricing discussions



---



PAY & PERKS



* Php 25,000/month + performance bonuses

* Paid via Wise (twice monthly)

* 100% remote

* Stable, long-term role with room to grow



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please reply to this job post with:



1. Your resume/CV

2. Written answers to the questions below



Applications without thoughtful answers will not be considered.



**QUESTIONS:**



1. Tell us about a time you had to push a client conversation forward even though it felt uncomfortable.

2. Describe a time you had to follow up multiple times to move a client toward a decision.

3. What part of client-facing sales do you find most challenging, and how do you handle it?



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



We are not looking for someone to “just reply to messages.”

We’re looking for someone who can think, follow up, and take ownership of client conversations.

title: Operations Manager
description:

title: Remote Sales VA | Cold Caller / Appointment Setter / Closer
description:
We are hiring 3 sales VAs from the Philippines for our online business:



2 Sales Openers / SDRs / Appointment Setters

1 Sales Closer



We sell a voice agent service that answers calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments into the client’s calendar, and sends a summary. Our main offer is $999/month.



-Openers / SDRs (2 positions)



Your role is to make outbound cold calls to real estate and property management companies, start conversations, identify pain points, and move leads forward quickly.



You will either:

finalize the deal  with the customer, or book a short call for the closer.



-Closer (1 position)



Your role is to take booked calls, confirm the prospect’s problem, control the conversation, and close the sale. You should be confident, direct, and comfortable handling sales calls.



What we want from all applicants:



Strong spoken English

Confident on the phone

Sales experience preferred

Comfortable with cold calling

Able to follow a script but still sound natural

Good listening skills

Fast follow-up and strong communication

Able to handle objections

Results-driven and disciplined

Important rules

Keep calls short and simple

Talk less than the prospect

Every call must end with either a closed deal or a clear next step

No long explanations about AI

title: Operations Manager
description:
About Earthside Farms:



Earthside Farms is a better-for-you snack brand redefining indulgence with clean-label candied nuts and organic dried fruit. No added sugar. No artificial ingredients. Bold flavors that drive repeat purchase.



We are scaling quickly across retail, distribution, and e-commerce and are building the operational backbone to support that growth.



Role Overview:



This is a high-ownership operations role with direct impact on revenue.



You will be responsible for ensuring product moves efficiently from production to shelf across distributors, retailers, and e-commerce. This includes managing orders, inventory, and supply chain coordination while continuously improving how the business operates.



This role is for someone who moves fast, solves problems independently, and defaults to automation over manual work.



Key Responsibilities:



Order Execution & Fulfillment

Own purchase order flow end-to-end across retail, wholesale, and e-commerce

Ensure orders are processed, shipped, and delivered accurately and on time

Manage documentation including invoices, BOLs, routing guides, and labels

Proactively resolve fulfillment issues before they impact customers



Sales Operations

Support new item setups across retailers and distributors

Maintain accurate pricing, product data, and sales materials

Track deductions, trade spend, and promotional activity

Ensure operational readiness for new accounts and product launches



Supply Chain & Inventory

Coordinate production runs with co-packers and suppliers

Manage inventory across warehouses and distributors including UNFI and KeHE

Monitor stock levels and prevent out-of-stocks or excess inventory

Track inbound and outbound shipments and resolve delays quickly



Operational Systems & Automation

Identify inefficiencies across workflows and implement better systems

Use AI tools to automate repetitive tasks across reporting, order management, and operations

Build processes that improve speed, accuracy, and visibility

Replace manual work with scalable solutions wherever possible



What We’re Looking For

3–5+ years in operations, supply chain, logistics, or a similar role

Experience working in the US CPG ecosystem, ideally with distributors like UNFI or KeHE

Strong systems mindset with comfort in ERPs, CRMs, and spreadsheets

Experience using AI tools to improve workflows and productivity

High attention to detail with the ability to move quickly

Ability to operate independently and take ownership without constant direction

Strong problem-solving skills and bias toward action



Who This Is Not For

Someone who prefers structured, repetitive work

Someone who waits for direction instead of taking initiative

Someone who relies on manual processes instead of automation



If you’re a go-getter with a passion for sales and business development, we’d love to hear from you! Apply today to join Earthside Farms and help us bring our delicious, better-for-you snacks to more customers.

title: TikTok Shop & E-Commerce Lead
description:
Company Description



At Earthside Farms, we are dedicated to creating snacks that are healthy, wholesome, and delicious. Our vegan and sugar-free snack range is crafted using natural, nutrient-rich ingredients to support a healthier lifestyle. We aim to inspire individuals to make mindful and nutritious food choices without compromising on taste. With a focus on providing satisfying snacking experiences, we are committed to reshaping the way people think about healthy eating.



Overview



We are looking for someone to own and scale our TikTok Shop and broader e-commerce ecosystem. This includes Shopify, TikTok Shop, Amazon, 
, Faire, and other e-commerce wholesale platforms.



This is a senior, execution-focused role. We are not looking for someone to learn TikTok on the job. You must come in as a TikTok expert with a proven track record of driving revenue, and then extend that expertise across other channels.



Responsibilities:

- Own TikTok Shop end-to-end, including product listings, pricing, promotions, creator strategy, and storefront management

- Drive revenue through TikTok Shop via both organic content and paid ads

- Manage and scale creator and affiliate programs with a clear focus on sales, not just content output

- Launch, manage, and optimize paid advertising across TikTok, Amazon, Walmart Marketplace, Google Adwords, and other relevant channels

- Expand learnings from TikTok into Shopify, Amazon, 
, Faire, and wholesale platforms

- Optimize product listings across all platforms for conversion and discoverability

- Monitor and improve key metrics including conversion rate, AOV, CAC, and ROAS

- Identify opportunities for bundling, merchandising, and pricing optimization

- Manage inventory flow across channels to prevent stockouts and overages

- Analyze performance data and provide clear, actionable recommendations



Requirements:

- Proven track record managing TikTok Shop with measurable revenue results

- Deep expertise in TikTok, including content strategy, creator management, affiliate programs, and paid ads

- Hands-on experience scaling TikTok Shop from early stage to meaningful revenue

- Experience managing at least one additional platform such as Amazon or Walmart Marketplace

- Strong performance marketing background with direct experience running paid ads

- Data-driven with the ability to make fast decisions and iterate quickly

- Comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment without established processes

- Strong ownership mentality with accountability for results



What Success Looks Like:

- TikTok Shop becomes a meaningful and growing revenue channel

- Consistent improvement in ROAS, CAC, and conversion rates

- Reliable creator and affiliate engine that drives predictable sales

- Expansion of successful TikTok strategies into other e-commerce channels

- Clear reporting with insights that directly improve performance

title: Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist (Remote)
description:
LOCATION: Remote (Company based in Georgia; operates in GA & SC). Open to applicants outside the U.S.

COMPANY: HBI HOME SOLUTIONS, LLC

POSITION TYPE: FULL-TIME

Compensation: $6-$10/hr + commission on closed deals -> Total earning: $1,000 – $4,000 per month.



JOB DESCRIPTION:

We’re a high-performing U.S.-based real estate investment company that closes 100+ deals per year. We’re looking for a Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist to help match our investment property inventory with active buyers. You’ll join a remote-first team that moves fast, celebrates wins, and offers long-term growth for the right individual.

This is a great fit for remote professionals or U.S. expats living abroad who want a full-time role with consistent deals, structured sales training, and a career pathway in the real estate industry.



OUR COMPANY:

We’re a real estate wholesaling company with main markets in GA & SC with a focus on acquiring deals from Real Estate Agents. We transact about 80-100 deals a year with gross revenue of $1.8M+/year. You can learn more about us and our model through these two podcast videos on Youtube:







Responsibilities

• Market off-market and exclusive investment properties to a curated list of investor-buyers

• Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing buyers

• Negotiate sale prices, contract terms, and closing timelines with buyers

• Manage leads and daily outreach using CRM tools (40–50 contacts per day expected)

• Track activity, buyer feedback, and pipeline updates consistently

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure clean and fast closings



Minimum Qualifications

• Fluent in English with minimal accent, capable of clear and effective communication.

• Must be able to work minimum 8-hour shift on US Eastern time zone (8-10 AM EST to 5-7 PM EST).

• 6+ months of experience in real estate sales (ideally with wholesaling companies)

• At least 2 monitors and modern computer (less than 5 years old)

• High-speed internet (20 mb/s upload & download speed minimum) 

• Proven experience with outbound communication (calls, texts,
s) at high volume

• Comfortable negotiating and closing deals over the phone

• Self-motivated and able to thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Strong communication, organizational, and follow-up skills

• Ability to work independently and efficiently in a remote environment.



Preferred Skills

• Familiarity with platforms like GoHighLevel, Investorbase, or InvestorLift

• Experience working with real estate investors and understanding investment buying criteria

• Experience in high ticket sales or negotiation against other parties to maximize profit

• Basic understanding of real estate contracts and deal structures

title: Professional video editor
description:
Are you a video editor who knows how to make trendy, high-quality social content for real estate, lifestyle, or DTC brands? We're looking for you!



WHO WE ARE

We're Movement Marketing, a Dutch growth agency. We help local businesses fill their books and DTC brands hit scale, through paid advertising and organic social content. We work with a growing portfolio of brands across the Dutch market: a mix of ambitious local entrepreneurs and bigger household names.



WHAT YOU'LL EDIT

- Short-form videos for Meta and TikTok

- Meta video ads and organic social content

- 5-7 new edits per week, and iterate on winners



WHAT YOU NEED TO BE GOOD AT

- Trendy custom captions, blending text effects

- Color grading and motion blur

- Premium effects and smooth transitions

- Cinematic high-speed ramps and B-roll layering

- SFX and sound design

- Pacing that holds attention from the hook to the CTA



TOOLS

- CapCut is our main tool. If you use Final Cut, Premiere, or DaVinci, that's fine, but most of our workflow runs in CapCut.



WHAT WE OFFER

- 8-24 hours per week

- $5-$15 per hour (depending on quality and experience)

- Long-term position



REQUIREMENTS

- 1+ year editing trendy, high-quality social content for Meta or TikTok

- Portfolio with at least 5 video creatives that you're proud of (ads or organic)

- Fluent English for briefs and async communication

- Minimum 4 hours a week overlap with Central European Time (~3 PM-7 PM Philippine Time)



NICE TO HAVE

- Working knowledge of AI video tools (Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1)



HOW TO APPLY

Reply with:

- Your portfolio (5+ short-form video creatives)

- Which brands or clients you edited them for

- Your expected hourly rate (within $5-$15)

- Hours per week available



Start your message with the word pannenkoek so we know you read this.



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test edit so we can see how you work with our raw footage, scripts, and style.

title: Senior Amazon FBA Wholesale Operations VA — Part-Time, Long-Term
description:
I run an established US-based Amazon FBA wholesale store and need a senior part-time operations VA to manage day-to-day operations and supplier relationships while I focus on sourcing strategy and capital decisions.

The store has a proven product flow but is currently rebuilding inventory after recent sell-through. I'm not running high volume — yet — and I'm hiring this role to scale carefully, not aggressively.



Hours: Part-time, ~15-20 hrs/week. Some overlap with US business hours preferred but flexible. You can have other clients.

Rate: $5/hr paid weekly via Wise or PayPal.

Start: Within 1-2 weeks of selection.

Length: Long-term role. I'm hiring once and want this to last 12+ months.



What I bring to the role

I've built a custom sourcing platform that handles the heaviest lift: it scans Amazon daily for qualified products, applies a rules engine to filter them, and feeds a priority-sorted list of brands worth pursuing. You don't do product research from scratch — you start with a curated brand list.

I handle: sourcing system maintenance, supplier payment, opening order approvals, capital decisions, final negotiation sign-off.

You handle: everything between brand-on-the-list and product-in-Amazon.



What you'll do

Supplier discovery (~35% of time):

Work from a Google Sheet of priority-sorted brands my system generates. For each brand, find authorized US wholesale distributors. You bring the expertise — you know how to identify dealer networks, vet authorization claims, and tell a real distributor from a competitor or scam. I provide an SOP that defines how I want findings recorded (data fields, red-flag conventions, how to flag Amazon-restriction language) so the output integrates cleanly with my system. Up to 3 supplier candidates per brand: name, website, contact info, MOQ, restrictions, notes.

Supplier outreach and relationship management (~25% of time):

You'll have a dedicated
 address 
 and own outreach end-to-end. Initial outreach, follow-ups, supplier intake questions, and ongoing relationship maintenance once a supplier is approved. Notify me on WhatsApp when a new supplier expresses interest before you reply, so we align on tone for the first response.

Negotiation within guardrails (~10% of time):

You communicate directly with suppliers during pricing and term discussions — I don't want to be in those conversations. You negotiate freely on lead time, shipping, reorder cadence, dispute resolution, and standard back-and-forth.

These escalate to me for explicit approval before you respond:



Pricing and discount commitments

MOQs and opening order size

Payment terms (net-30, prepay, deposits)

MAP commitments

Restrictions on sales channel or geography



I respond fast — typically within 1-2 hours during US business hours. The structure: you propose, I approve, you communicate. You're the voice; I'm the wallet.



Order coordination (~15% of time, growing):

Once I approve and fund an order, you place the PO, coordinate with my prep center via a WhatsApp group (you'll be added with me and the prep center), track delivery and inspection, and create the FBA inbound shipment plan in Seller Central. Handle exceptions — resolve what you can, escalate what you can't.



Store operations (~15% of time):

Day-to-day Seller Central tasks via sub-user access (operational permissions only — no banking or account settings): customer messages, return requests, suppressed listing fixes, account health monitoring, MAP violation reports, basic A-to-Z claim responses.

Escalate to me within hours, not days: IP complaints, suspension threats, brand authorization requests, anything that affects account standing.



Operational rhythm

Communication: WhatsApp for everything — day-to-day ops, negotiation approvals, weekly status, prep center coordination (in a separate group thread).

Weekly status: Brief Monday summary on WhatsApp — brands researched, suppliers contacted, replies handled, orders placed, dollars deployed, issues to flag.

Response expectations from me: 1-2 hours during US business hours for negotiation approvals; 4-6 hours for non-urgent decisions.

Response expectations from you: Within 24 hours during your working days for non-urgent supplier
s; WhatsApp messages acknowledged within 4 hours during your working hours.

I'm not expecting always-on coverage — this is part-time. Anything genuinely urgent that hits while you're off-shift, I'll handle.



What you need to have

Required:



- 3+ years hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience, US marketplace

- Direct wholesale FBA experience — not arbitrage, not private label, not dropshipping. You know what an authorized distributor relationship looks like, you understand MOQs/MAP/dealer applications, and you can spot a fake "wholesaler" from a real one.

- Experience negotiating with US suppliers via
 or phone — comfortable proposing terms, asking for concessions, reading between the lines of supplier responses

- Strong written English — your
s represent the brand to US suppliers

- Reliable computer, 20+ Mbps internet

- Comfort with structured workflows: Google Sheets, WhatsApp, documented SOPs



Strongly preferred:



- Track record identifying and vetting US authorized distributors (not Alibaba/AliExpress/dropship)

- Familiarity with Amazon brand gating, ungating, and which brand types are accessible to small wholesale resellers

- Experience with US prep centers and creating FBA inbound shipments

- Familiarity with Keepa (you don't need to operate it — my system does — but you should know what it shows).



Nice to have, not required:



- Helium 10, Sellerboard, or similar tooling familiarity

- Prior experience in a setup where automation handles discovery and the human owns relationships



What this role is not



- Product research. My system handles it.

- Final negotiation authority. I approve any pricing, MOQ, or term commitment before you respond.

- Always-on store ops. Part-time hours; urgent issues outside your hours come to me.

- Private label or arbitrage operations. Wholesale only.



How to apply

Send a message including:



- Wholesale FBA experience. Specific clients/brands you've worked with on wholesale (not arbitrage). How did you find their suppliers? What tools/processes did you use?

- One concrete example of a supplier relationship you helped onboard — what brand, how you found them, what made you confident they were legitimate.

- One example of a supplier negotiation you handled — what you were negotiating, what you asked for, how it landed.

- Your current client load. How many active clients? Are you available for ~30 hrs/week of dedicated time on my account?

- Hourly or weekly rate if different from my offer.

- Your timezone and typical work hours.



I respond within 48 hours to candidates I want to talk to. Generic copy-paste applications go to the bottom of the pile. I read every word. Have a wonderful day!

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About 1st Optimal:

1st Optimal is a high-end health optimization brand focused on helping high-achieving adults (ages 35-55) optimize their hormone health, energy, weight loss, and overall longevity. We combine functional medicine with personalized coaching, providing evidence-based care that empowers our clients to achieve their full potential. We are looking for a talented Graphic Designer to join our creative team to help bring our vision to life through compelling, high-quality design across various channels.



Position Overview:

As a Graphic Designer at 1st Optimal, you will be responsible for creating visually striking and impactful designs for a range of materials, both digital and print. Your work will support our marketing efforts across social media,
 campaigns, website content, lead magnets, eBooks, and other collateral. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of design principles, is proficient with Adobe Suite, Canva, and AI tools, and has experience in producing high-quality assets for both digital and traditional media.



Key Responsibilities:



Design and produce digital graphics for social media platforms, ensuring they are aligned with 1st Optimal's branding guidelines and are optimized for engagement and conversion.

Create visually appealing and functional designs for
 newsletters, website content, and landing pages.

Develop print materials including brochures, flyers, and other marketing assets.

Collaborate with the marketing team to create lead magnets and eBooks that are visually cohesive and user-friendly.

Design visual assets for advertisements, including but not limited to display ads, banners, and promotional content.

Work with the team to ensure all designs align with the company’s brand voice and mission.

Maintain a consistent visual style across all digital and print platforms while experimenting with new creative concepts.

Stay up-to-date with design trends, tools, and technologies to bring fresh ideas and techniques to the team.

Work under tight deadlines and manage multiple design projects simultaneously.



Requirements:



Proven experience as a Graphic Designer or similar role, with a strong portfolio showcasing your skills in digital, print, and web design.

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Canva.

Experience with AI design tools (e.g., DALL-E, MidJourney) to enhance creativity and efficiency.

After Effects and Motion Graphics 

Solid understanding of design principles and best practices for digital content.

Experience in designing social media graphics, website visuals,
 templates, print materials, and promotional content.

A keen eye for detail, color theory, and typography.

Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively within a team.

Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.

Experience with design for health, wellness, or lifestyle brands is a plus.



Preferred Skills:



Familiarity with web design tools like Figma or Sketch.

Knowledge of HTML/CSS for
 or web content design.

Familiarity with content management systems (CMS) like WordPress.

Understanding of SEO principles for web and social media graphics.

Video editing skills (preferred but not required).



What We Offer:



Competitive salary based on experience.

Flexible work schedule (remote or in-office).

Opportunity to work with a passionate and driven team.

Access to cutting-edge tools and technologies for design.

Career growth opportunities in a rapidly expanding health optimization brand.
